summary: Josh Hards and Simon Topping are all at sea, they don't know what to do with their lives. This all changes when Simon, surfing on the beige web, lands on a mysterious website (which they can never find again) and decides to spend his life savings on "The Box". "The Box" makes the boastful claim to be the finest collection of comedy sketches ever written (Duo Edition); "Guaranteed" to be the funniest series of comedy shorts that anyone…
_description: Josh Hards and Simon Topping are all at sea, they don't know what to do with their lives. This all changes when Simon, surfing on the beige web, lands on a mysterious website (which they can never find again) and decides to spend his life savings on "The Box". "The Box" makes the boastful claim to be the finest collection of comedy sketches ever written (Duo Edition); "Guaranteed" to be the funniest series of comedy shorts that anyone has ever witnessed, but something doesn't seem quite right. Who has compiled the material and what do they want you to believe? Come and witness the awesome comedy that lies within "The Box" as the boys unbox the scripts and perform it for the very first time, and maybe the last, before your very eyes and for your delight. Do fame and fortune beckon or is there more to "The Box" than first appears? Topping and Hards: Comedy From The Box is a part crafted, part improvised silly romp of a sketch show with a joy centred and surreal heart.

title: Bourgeois Maurice
summary: Cult-cabaret stars Bourgeois & Maurice return to Brighton Fringe for a new night of glamour-soaked nihilism and anarchic musical comedy. Known for original, razor-sharp satirical songs with a gleefully dark edge, the critically-acclaimed duo will mix old favourites with brand spanking new material for a riotous musical journey through the state of the world - frivolous, unhinged, and impeccably doomed. Their unique brand of pop-satire…
_description: Cult-cabaret stars Bourgeois & Maurice return to Brighton Fringe for a new night of glamour-soaked nihilism and anarchic musical comedy. Known for original, razor-sharp satirical songs with a gleefully dark edge, the critically-acclaimed duo will mix old favourites with brand spanking new material for a riotous musical journey through the state of the world - frivolous, unhinged, and impeccably doomed. Their unique brand of pop-satire and far-fetched fashion, has won them legions of fans around the world. From New York to Kettering, from an ex-public toilet to the Royal Opera House, it doesn’t matter to them as long as there’s a piano to bash, a lick of clear mascara to apply and a (semi) willing audience watching. Come for the laughs. Stay for the darkness. Leave humming something you probably shouldn’t.

_description: The boys from Der Wunderlich Revue are back again in an Alpine adventure, ram-packed with naughty nuns and yodelling yokels. Expect the usual mix of smut and singing, nudity and stupidity. And of course men cheerleading. Plus mime, unicycling and magic. Possibly some circus skills. Maybe some silly games. With the incomparable compering talents of Mr Desmond O'Connor on the 21st and Mr Meredith on the 10th. Brighton's, and probably the UK's, longest running all-male cabaret. You'll laugh till you wet yourself. "A batshit bonkers baffling bonanza of men at their sublime silliest." Five stars, says To Do List. Who could disagree? The most Fringe show in the Fringe. Book your seat quickly as these shows will sell out.

title: Ghost Songs To Die For With Madame Isolde
summary: Ghost Songs to Die For is a spooky, gloriously chaotic cabaret of true ghost stories, original songs, and one classic cover, with a distinctly Brighton twist. Your guide is Madame Isolde, a medium from 1936 who has drifted back into the future with insight from the astral plane and very strong opinions. She resurrects haunted theatres, restless spirits, and Brighton legends, including a ghost said to haunt the very Theatre Royal where…
_description: Ghost Songs to Die For is a spooky, gloriously chaotic cabaret of true ghost stories, original songs, and one classic cover, with a distinctly Brighton twist. Your guide is Madame Isolde, a medium from 1936 who has drifted back into the future with insight from the astral plane and very strong opinions. She resurrects haunted theatres, restless spirits, and Brighton legends, including a ghost said to haunt the very Theatre Royal where the show is staged. Each tale becomes a song that is eerie, ridiculous, and unexpectedly touching. Alongside original music written for the show, Madame Isolde summons one iconic voice from beyond the veil, because even Brighton ghosts have impeccable taste. This is not a horror show. There are no jump scares and nobody climbs out of the audience. Expect dark humour, theatrical storytelling, and an atmosphere that feels perfectly at home by the sea. ***** Please also search for MADAME ISOLDE’S CRAZY ZODIAC CABARET *****

Since exploding onto the London comedy scene in the first part of the second decade of the first century of the current millennium, Nick has been seen as a comedian's comedian, a niece's uncle and a landlord's tenant. Many attempt to follow the path he has trod. Most of them succeed as it's actually quite a well-trodden path with clear signs and good facilities. Yet only Nick has been regularly acknowledged as a standup comedian that consistently uses the name 'Nick Elleray'. Long may he continue to do so. In this show Nick will probably talk about biscuits, laziness and testosterone, amongst other things.

title: Counterattack Youth
summary: A wedding to celebrate. Four friends in a pub. One evening that goes exactly as planned. Or so we thought. The evening completely off the rails. Counterattack: Youth is a 70-minute pub drama set entirely in a real pub, with the audience seated as fellow patrons at the next table. No stage. No distance. Just four women in their late twenties, a round of drinks, and every conversation they've been putting off. It is a little bit of…
_description: A wedding to celebrate. Four friends in a pub. One evening that goes exactly as planned. Or so we thought. The evening completely off the rails. Counterattack: Youth is a 70-minute pub drama set entirely in a real pub, with the audience seated as fellow patrons at the next table. No stage. No distance. Just four women in their late twenties, a round of drinks, and every conversation they've been putting off. It is a little bit of everything: a celebration, an argument, a prank, a toast, and even a reminiscence about school days. But most importantly, it is one very honest conversation about what it actually means to be young right now.

title: E F Our Expressions Equal To Our Fulfilments
summary: Talented Nigerian marginalized persons had always craved for the international spaces to display our amazing talents for poetry, music, song, dance and artistic expressions recognized with our diversity, however, the deprivation of our freedom of self-expression due to our diverse orientation has limited the fulfilment of our destinies. As a remedial endeavour, Our Expressions Equal to our Fulfilments (E=F), an initiative of ICATHED, a…
_description: Talented Nigerian marginalized persons had always craved for the international spaces to display our amazing talents for poetry, music, song, dance and artistic expressions recognized with our diversity, however, the deprivation of our freedom of self-expression due to our diverse orientation has limited the fulfilment of our destinies. As a remedial endeavour, Our Expressions Equal to our Fulfilments (E=F), an initiative of ICATHED, a set of artistic expressions which includes but not limited to poetry, music, song, dance, digital & visual arts installations, story-telling & cultural exchanges, aimed at self-discovery and self-actualization of discriminated, marginalized and the underprivileged individuals, groups and communities in Nigeria has been a binge. The more the safe spaces we get to express ourselves, the more our fulfilment comes handy. At Brighton Fringe, we intend to entertain our audience with our aura-spiced and charismatically garnished show.

title: Orwell The Road To 1984
summary: A timely portrait of a writer whose words remain a warning - and a hope. George Orwell is perhaps the most influential English writer of the twentieth century. His classic tales Animal Farm and Nineteen Eighty-Four which warn of the dangers of totalitarianism - erosion of free speech, abuse of power, increasing control of all aspects of our everyday lives - resonate now more than ever. Orwell’s dystopian concepts such as 'Big Brother…
_description: A timely portrait of a writer whose words remain a warning - and a hope. George Orwell is perhaps the most influential English writer of the twentieth century. His classic tales Animal Farm and Nineteen Eighty-Four which warn of the dangers of totalitarianism - erosion of free speech, abuse of power, increasing control of all aspects of our everyday lives - resonate now more than ever. Orwell’s dystopian concepts such as 'Big Brother is watching you', 'Room 101' and 'thoughtcrime' have become everyday phrases. But where did his vision of the future come from? In this powerful and moving play, MARK STRATFORD takes you on a fascinating journey through the extraordinary experiences that shaped the work of this perceptive and compelling writer. In this age of misinformation, political extremism and digital surveillance, ORWELL: The Road to 1984 is a play for our time.

summary: Clifton Hill & Montpelier is a quiet Brighton neighbourhood with distinctive architecture, a rich social history and a certain Brighton "quirkiness"! This tour looks at the geography, geology, building styles and historic characters that make the area one of the city's most attractive areas. Churches, chutney and radical feminism combine in this colourful district.

Reader, do you remember the horrible golden years of tumblr? If any of this resonates with you, Nerd Ball welcomes you with open arms. Join the best of Brighton's alternative performance scene in a celebratory explosion of our special interests and fan culture. Expect outlandish drag, outrageous vocals, and performers who will dazzle you with the lengths they are willing to go to for their favourite things. We promise you weirdness, wonder and warmth, in our exploration of how the things we love make us who we are.

Two middle-aged blokes, fully clothed (again, sorry), wondering... why are they throwing money at us? Expect high-quality stand-up, surreal stories, surprisingly moving moments, and—inevitably—plenty of knob gags. Less "Magic Mike", more tragic mic. Definitely more sausage than sizzle... Proof that laughter really is the best medicine. You’ll only come once. West End New Act of the Year Finalist 2024. Beat the Blackout Winner – January 2025 & Funhouse Championship winner - June 2025.

Shinanne is a rising star of the Irish comedy scene and her show sold out at Edinburgh Fringe in both 2024 and 2025.

title: The Vampire Run
summary: A dark and stormy night. A vampire’s castle outlined by lightning. An hour to find and kill the dreaded fiend... And one idiot trying to manage the escalating chaos. Join a fast-paced, hilariously deadly choose-your-own adventure where three players at a time must decide how to approach a variety of obstacles to reach the vampire’s chamber. BUT one of the players is evil, and the audience must decide who before it’s too late. This is…
_description: A dark and stormy night. A vampire’s castle outlined by lightning. An hour to find and kill the dreaded fiend... And one idiot trying to manage the escalating chaos. Join a fast-paced, hilariously deadly choose-your-own adventure where three players at a time must decide how to approach a variety of obstacles to reach the vampire’s chamber. BUT one of the players is evil, and the audience must decide who before it’s too late. This is the debut solo show from award winning writer and performer Jonathan Laury (Best Comedy, Unrestricted View Film Festival 2019). Think something like Knightmare but with a social deduction twist and spiralling madness as time ticks on and the castle starts to change... Shortlisted for a Glitch award, and described by audiences as "Brilliant, slick, funny, 10/10 would go again" and "My favourite theatrical experience of 2025." It’s a comedy, it’s a horror, it’s a game, it’s a show! And it’s definitely the most fun you can have dying horribly.

title: Whisky Tango Foxtrot
summary: It’s the late 1970’s, Jack Bryan, a young father, shop steward and steel worker experiences the pain of redundancy just before Christmas and the impending birth of his second child. Caught up in the decline of traditional British Industries he joins the police at a time when that organisation is also in a state of rapid change. For the next 30 years Jack witnesses, first-hand, some of the most important events in late 20th century,…
_description: It’s the late 1970’s, Jack Bryan, a young father, shop steward and steel worker experiences the pain of redundancy just before Christmas and the impending birth of his second child. Caught up in the decline of traditional British Industries he joins the police at a time when that organisation is also in a state of rapid change. For the next 30 years Jack witnesses, first-hand, some of the most important events in late 20th century, British social history: the race riots of the early 80s; the miners’ strike of 84-85; and the decimation of British Industries due to both globalisation and Thatcher. Coupled with all this, Jack finds himself entering a world which very few people get to know... a kind of psychotic Narnia that is governed by its own rules. In the telling of this story Jack attempts to explain to the general public the reality of this parallel world. The results are both grittily honest, totally enlightening and hilariously funny.

_description: Create your own botanical jewellery in this relaxed, hands-on workshop. Using real pressed flowers and UV resin, you’ll design and make a unique pendant necklace to take home. You’ll be guided step-by-step through arranging delicate florals, working with resin, and finishing your piece to a high standard. With a curated selection of flowers, foliage, and subtle gold accents to choose from, you can create something that reflects your own style, whether minimal, colourful, or romantic. No experience is needed, making this workshop perfect for beginners or anyone looking to try something new in a calm, creative setting. All materials are provided, including your pendant and chain, and you’ll leave with a finished piece of jewellery to keep or gift. More spaces and offers avalibe on silverandsage.co.uk Duration is approximately 1.5–2 hours.

title: David Ingram You Better Work In Progress
summary: Fresh from sell-out performances of his Edinburgh show "Carrot Top: Memoirs of a Gay", (“A deeply personal, hilarious and empowering journey” - The Scotsman, "Cutting, clever and dirty all at the same time" - One4Review), retired twink and international flight attendant David Ingram brings a brand new Work in Progress to Brighton. Expect high energy, bold confessions and non-stop punchlines.

title: Emma Or Emily
summary: ‘Tell me. Tell me exactly what you think about me. Which part of me do you like? Do you like my neck? Or elbow?’ One opera singer, one actor, an evening of drinking, debauchery, and deception. A failed opera singer, Emily lives a lonely but lush life as a housewife. A visit from her old friend Emma offers an escape from her isolation. But as the two drink and dance into the night Emma gradually brings the worst out of Emily,…
_description: ‘Tell me. Tell me exactly what you think about me. Which part of me do you like? Do you like my neck? Or elbow?’ One opera singer, one actor, an evening of drinking, debauchery, and deception. A failed opera singer, Emily lives a lonely but lush life as a housewife. A visit from her old friend Emma offers an escape from her isolation. But as the two drink and dance into the night Emma gradually brings the worst out of Emily, highlighting her flaws, amplifying her insecurities, and making her smaller and more helpless. Moon Kim, creator of the surrealist dreamscapes and ★★★★★ hits The Waiting Room and The Arms, returns with Emma or Emily — a new experimental opera-play exploring the fractured mind of an artist. Featuring an original score by Hungarian-American composer Ábel MGE, marking their second collaboration.

title: Happily Never After
summary: The Maydays return to the Fringe with their 5-star improvised show – Happily Never After – a "darkly comedic" twisted musical tale inspired by gothic themes, fairy-tales, and the warped imaginations that brought us Lemony Snicket, Beetlejuice, Shockheaded Peter and Grimm's Tales. Plucked from the seed of your suggestion, The Maydays will take you on a unique journey – weaving a gothic tale that’s completely different every time.…
_description: The Maydays return to the Fringe with their 5-star improvised show – Happily Never After – a "darkly comedic" twisted musical tale inspired by gothic themes, fairy-tales, and the warped imaginations that brought us Lemony Snicket, Beetlejuice, Shockheaded Peter and Grimm's Tales. Plucked from the seed of your suggestion, The Maydays will take you on a unique journey – weaving a gothic tale that’s completely different every time. There’s no telling what strange characters, innocent beasts or talking objects you might meet along the way! The Maydays have been wow-ing audiences across the UK and Europe, with packed houses and standing ovations, for their spontaneous show that Reviews Hub called "touching, incredibly funny", and "rich in narrative twists and charm". With a bespoke, improvised soundtrack for every show, this will be a truly creepy, mischievous and fantastical experience.

title: Tim Reeves An Hour Of Accessible Material To Further My Career

title: Smoove Turrell Live Support
summary: Get ready for an unforgettable night of soul power and killer grooves as Smoove & Turrell bring their explosive live show to the Fringe. _description: Get ready for an unforgettable night of soul power and killer grooves as Smoove & Turrell bring their explosive live show to the Fringe. Fusing northern funk, vintage soul and funky beats, this band have built a reputation for electric performances with the incredible vocals of John Turrell always front and centre. From deep, heartfelt soul ballads to floor-filling funk anthems, Smoove & Turrell deliver a set packed with fan favourites and fresh cuts alike. Their chemistry is undeniable, their sound is timeless yet modern, and their live band brings an intensity that records simply can’t contain.

So get ready for a fun filled evening, where we are bringing the depth and drama of classical music to the feel-good factor of your favourite pop hits!

title: Brighton Fringe Jazz Club
summary: A stellar company of musicians perform tributes to two powerhouses of the jazz world. Contrasting events with sublime lineups and great music. Fri 8th May: Water From An Ancient Well: A Tribute to Abdullah Ibrahim The unique, laid back, funky style of this South African composer and pianist makes his music unique and joyous. The band guides you through Dollar Brand’s musical life from Capetown roots to the anthem of struggle against…
_description: A stellar company of musicians perform tributes to two powerhouses of the jazz world. Contrasting events with sublime lineups and great music. Fri 8th May: Water From An Ancient Well: A Tribute to Abdullah Ibrahim The unique, laid back, funky style of this South African composer and pianist makes his music unique and joyous. The band guides you through Dollar Brand’s musical life from Capetown roots to the anthem of struggle against apartheid. Authentic reinterpretations of his most famous pieces and new tributes to his musical style. Fri 22nd May: Joss Peach’s Sidewinders BAFTA winning pianist leads his new 6 piece ensemble featuring a 3 horn front line of Josephine Davies, Robbie Robson and Matt Seddon- each highly acclaimed players in their own right. This carefully curated set of lovingly arranged latin, swing, calypso, boogaloo and groove classics will take you on a diverse musical journey and leave you with a big jazzy smile on your face! Photo credit: Wayne John Grundy

summary: Jade Gebbie (British Comedy Guide Performance Award Finalist 2025, writer for The News Quiz, Nature Table) has always been a people pleaser, but now she’s hit her mid-thirties she’s delving into how it’s held her back, annoyed her loved ones and why overthinking fictional scenarios isn’t a reasonable excuse for missing a work meeting. Come along to this debut from Jade for fun, laughter and a bit of anxiety... after all, she is a millennial.

Funky blues and soul, with original material and arrangements of classics including James Brown, Big Joe Turner, Donnie Hathaway, Otis Rush and much, much more. Full horn section and harmonica for that really big sound. These rare appearances are often a sell-out so book early!

Felix & Friends is Brighton's long running cabaret carousel, hosted by a potty-mouthed drag slag and attended by her very peculiar friends. Expect to hear tragic tales of love and lust as Felix delves elbow deep into the annals of her dating history. Prepare to laugh, cry and squirm as her special guests take the stage to do... unspeakable things. Each show promises new performances, unique experiences and an avalanche of rainbow-flavoured nonsense. So take the plunge and come find us, every Friday night at Caravanserai: Junk Poets. Felix Le Freak is a musical comedian, writer and cabaret performer based in the UK. They are the winner of Drag Idol UK, author of Serving Face and the creator of sell-out productions including Fagwartz; Men and Other Problems; and their long-running variety show, Felix & Friends.

title: Shakespeares Lost
summary: The Brighton Shakespeare Company returns, this time with a new play, a comedy inspired by the works of the bard. Waiting for Godot meets William Shakespeare via the cartoons of Gary Larson. A man washes up on another castaway's island, a teacher who is in possession of an icon containing a copy of The Complete Works of William Shakespeare. Unbeknownst to the castaway teacher, the icon contains an imprisoned and mischievous genie who…
_description: The Brighton Shakespeare Company returns, this time with a new play, a comedy inspired by the works of the bard. Waiting for Godot meets William Shakespeare via the cartoons of Gary Larson. A man washes up on another castaway's island, a teacher who is in possession of an icon containing a copy of The Complete Works of William Shakespeare. Unbeknownst to the castaway teacher, the icon contains an imprisoned and mischievous genie who grants them three wishes, one of which is the conjuring up of Shakespeare's Juliet from Romeo & Juliet. Comical confusion ensues when only one of them can communicate with Juliet as all she knows is Elizabethan English. The wishes get more chaotic, interference comes from other dimensions and the plot twists and turns, leaving only one of them marooned on the deserted island.

title: Selena Mersey Bisexuelle
summary: Johnny is a hard-boiled detective from New York City, California, and he’s got just one more case to crack before he retires from the CSI Miami. See, somebody did a very bad thing, and he'll be damned if they get away with it. But there’s one thing Johnny didn’t expect. The clues all start to point towards the mysterious dame he met this morning... Featuring original music, dance, questionable puppetry, and side-splitting laughs,…
_description: Johnny is a hard-boiled detective from New York City, California, and he’s got just one more case to crack before he retires from the CSI Miami. See, somebody did a very bad thing, and he'll be damned if they get away with it. But there’s one thing Johnny didn’t expect. The clues all start to point towards the mysterious dame he met this morning... Featuring original music, dance, questionable puppetry, and side-splitting laughs, Bisexuelle is the hotly anticipated second show from Brighton Fringe multi-award winner and Musical Comedy Awards finalist Selena Mersey. "Heartfelt and hilarious... Mersey is a star of the Fringe" ★★★★★ The Reviews Hub "Some of the most fun you’ll have at the Fringe... seductive, silly and incredibly smart" ★★★★ The List Directed by Annie North

title: Ask A Stripper Pulling Back The G String
summary: Ask A Stripper is a comedy show like no other. Real life strippers reveal all in this fiercely feminist and riotously funny Q&A. Ever wanted to know what strippers eat for breakfast? How do they really spend their money? Ever dated a customer? Stacey Clare (author of "The Ethical Stripper") and Sabrina Jade (star of reality TV show "Slagwars") return to Brighton Fringe with their candid humour, razor sharp wit and iconic stage…
_description: Ask A Stripper is a comedy show like no other. Real life strippers reveal all in this fiercely feminist and riotously funny Q&A. Ever wanted to know what strippers eat for breakfast? How do they really spend their money? Ever dated a customer? Stacey Clare (author of "The Ethical Stripper") and Sabrina Jade (star of reality TV show "Slagwars") return to Brighton Fringe with their candid humour, razor sharp wit and iconic stage presence. No one does crowd-work like strippers can - from working long hours performing for boozed up punters, there is no heckle they can't shut down. Ask A Stripper lifts a lid on a deeply mysterious, stigmatised and misunderstood industry, and offers insights on working conditions, regulations and how sex work is represented in popular culture. From backstage banter, to brutal honesty, this show will have you laughing as much as questioning everything you've ever thought you knew about the sex industry. Ever had a burning question? There's a cream for that.

title: The Cringe Factor Rock And Roll Part 2
venue_name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
summary: The Cringiest show at the Fringe is back... with a sequel nobody asked for! Join Ian Fox, a comedian who's aged like a carton of milk left in the sun, and his guests dissecting the cringe-worthy, the mind-boggling, and the downright bizarre. This hit new show from the 2025 Fringe returns with a brand-new selection clips, that should've stayed buried and with a ton of cultural debris from yesteryear for the comics to wade through. Belt…
_description: The Cringiest show at the Fringe is back... with a sequel nobody asked for! Join Ian Fox, a comedian who's aged like a carton of milk left in the sun, and his guests dissecting the cringe-worthy, the mind-boggling, and the downright bizarre. This hit new show from the 2025 Fringe returns with a brand-new selection clips, that should've stayed buried and with a ton of cultural debris from yesteryear for the comics to wade through. Belt yourself in for sharp wit, awkward laughter, and a whole lot of nostalgia or nausea digging up the cultural graveyard. The host and guests may have aged badly, but these cultural relics have aged even worse. Join us for a no-holds-barred dissection of the past. Expect sharp wit, awkward humour, and a whole lot of WTF moments. "Ian Fox is Several divisions higher in comedy league" - Chortle, Edinburgh Fringe "C*nty F*cks" - Kate Copstick, as seen on Childrens TV in the 80s & 90s, and erudite Scotsman Journalist

title: Cabaret Impedimenta
summary: An impossible variety show hosted by John-Luke Roberts. Amazing acts try to entertain you under increasingly difficult circumstances. Spin the wheel, and find out if a singer can still sing with a bubble machine pointed point-blank in their face, or how a professional hula hooper gets on while haunted by a Victorian ghost, or if there is any point to ventriloquism when the lights are off, or if a comedian’s jokes work when the…
_description: An impossible variety show hosted by John-Luke Roberts. Amazing acts try to entertain you under increasingly difficult circumstances. Spin the wheel, and find out if a singer can still sing with a bubble machine pointed point-blank in their face, or how a professional hula hooper gets on while haunted by a Victorian ghost, or if there is any point to ventriloquism when the lights are off, or if a comedian’s jokes work when the microphone is held in the mouth of the oldest audience member.

Watch David compere with three different international guests each night as they take on the hecklers. Some comics say it is their favourite show…

Wood panels, low ceiling, dancefloor. It shouldn’t work for acid house... but it does. Residents Serge Santiago and David Parr plus a special guest TBA.…

It’s intimate, and it sells out.

_description: The Crucible if it had dry humping meets Skins if it f***ed glee. (it isn’t a musical but someone might sing at some point). Press night, a living room. Relationships are on the line, dynamics shift and drinks flow. Descending into chaos, these players start to question their morality and reality. Will the show ever be performed again? We’ll have to see what the reviews say. From the creators of sold out show RANK, this dark comedy with an ensemble cast will have you on your knees praying for an answer.

title: Something Sometime Someone
summary: How baffling that people hear Charlie as she enunciates her name Rushali (ROO-SHA-LEE) - In this debut comedy hour a cacophony unveils as you uncover that yes it is rude to call an Indian Aunty - “a peanut eating pachyderm”. Just like New York City’s sewer covers, Rushali was made in India - right in the heart of Bollywood - Mumbai. She smuggled herself(legally) into the USA in her twenties only to find herself in Amsterdam’s comedy…
_description: How baffling that people hear Charlie as she enunciates her name Rushali (ROO-SHA-LEE) - In this debut comedy hour a cacophony unveils as you uncover that yes it is rude to call an Indian Aunty - “a peanut eating pachyderm”. Just like New York City’s sewer covers, Rushali was made in India - right in the heart of Bollywood - Mumbai. She smuggled herself(legally) into the USA in her twenties only to find herself in Amsterdam’s comedy scene (no, not the red light district.. cmon.. what a cliche!) attempting to make the Dutch laugh - a feat not for the faint hearted. As she navigates this world wondering if her dead grandmother is controlling it - she pays homage to Bollywood as one rightfully must when they are born dancing to it's tunes.

title: Dinki Disco
summary: Get ready to wiggle, giggle and boogie! Our Children’s Disco is a joyful burst of family fun for 0–6s and their grown-ups but older children are very welcome to join the fun! Expect baby disco beats, action songs, giant parachute games, bubbles galore and plenty of old-fashioned silliness. We’ll kick off with high-five meet & greets, warm-up dances, and toe-tapping tunes then dive into inflatable instruments fun for some noisy, giggly…
_description: Get ready to wiggle, giggle and boogie! Our Children’s Disco is a joyful burst of family fun for 0–6s and their grown-ups but older children are very welcome to join the fun! Expect baby disco beats, action songs, giant parachute games, bubbles galore and plenty of old-fashioned silliness. We’ll kick off with high-five meet & greets, warm-up dances, and toe-tapping tunes then dive into inflatable instruments fun for some noisy, giggly musical play. Little ones can bounce, wiggle or throw their best shapes — whether that’s gentle bouncing in arms or full-on freestyle moves on the dancefloor. It’s all about exploring music through movement, however little (or big!) that looks. Come for the dancing, stay for the smiles, laughs and family fun. Big fun for tiny dancers!

title: The Big Bite Size Breakfast Show
summary: Brighton's unique theatre café experience! After our 2025 Brighton Fringe sell-outs - celebrate our 20th birthday with TWO NEW, delicious menus of ten-minute plays. Comedy, eccentricity & minidrama served with a warm welcome and free Trading Post coffee, Bird & Blend tea, croissant & strawberry. This show promises a whirlwind of excitement and surprises, as Ray uses various different gases to craft stunning bubble sculptures, effects, and magical displays. Prepare to be amazed as Ray creates a volcano bubble, a soap bubble carousel, a bubble ghost, and even a tornado inside a bubble! The show was inspired by Ray’s work with SEND schools, adult neurodivergent groups, and science centres across Europe. The performance is suitable for children and adults with additional needs. Join Ray and see if he can create the ultimate square bubble! This is the UK & Ireland's favourite bubble show with over 130 dates in 2025 and combined audiences of over 30,000!!!

This unique production blends storytelling, puzzles, and audience participation as young detectives uncover fascinating secrets from the past. When the mischievous Tick Tock Taker—a villainous time-thief—starts stealing moments from history, the gang must leap through time to restore the past and protect our future. Packed with laughter, surprises, and hands-on fun, this show invites kids to join the quest to save history itself. Perfect for curious minds and families looking for an unforgettable experience!

With over 20 years of circus and clowning experience, Darryl’s silent comedy blends world-class juggling, inventive physical theatre, and heart-warming audience interaction. His humour transcends age and language, captivating children, parents, and grandparents alike.

The Blue Knot is a 45-minute interactive sea-shanty musical adventure for children aged 4 to 8 years old and their families. It features original songs performed live on musical instruments, alongside singing and moving to music together. Our story tells the tale of a Captain who is on a journey to help feed the harbour community. The Captain wants to find food for the people of the harbour but will greed get the better of them? WINNER - Festival Directors' Discretionary Award - Durham Fringe Festival 2025 Created and performed by Merryweather Theatre, an arts company which writes and develops musical adventures specifically for young children and their families. With 50+ performances in theatres and arts venues around the UK, we are very excited to be bringing The Blue Knot to Brighton Fringe!

_description: Imagine a stage where dragons, wizards, and brave adventurers come alive; not from a script, but through the laughter and creativity of children. Adventures! Is kid-friendly DnD-type improv show where young audiences guide the story, shape the heroes, and even roll the dice to determine what happens next. Every performance is unique: children shout out suggestions, help solve puzzles, and sometimes even hop up to improvise as goblins, fairies, or courageous wizards. With the help of a friendly story master Donal (the comedian behind the Science Magic shows) each quest is as much about giggles and imagination as it is about dragons and dungeons, a perfect introduction to storytelling, teamwork, and the power of adventure. In a world of screens, lets get back to using our imaginations.

title: Invasion Jomarzeb
summary: A bold, multi-media spectacle from Philippine Theatre UK on its 23rd anniversary, INVASION (JoMarZeb) leaps across time—from the anxious streets of 1940s Manila to the quiet corners of modern-day Oxford. Three mischievous child-like ghosts, a teacher, a lawyer and a nun, crash into the present, pulling audiences into a haunting, humorous, and deeply moving human journey that blends horror, drama, comedy, music, film and history. At its…
_description: A bold, multi-media spectacle from Philippine Theatre UK on its 23rd anniversary, INVASION (JoMarZeb) leaps across time—from the anxious streets of 1940s Manila to the quiet corners of modern-day Oxford. Three mischievous child-like ghosts, a teacher, a lawyer and a nun, crash into the present, pulling audiences into a haunting, humorous, and deeply moving human journey that blends horror, drama, comedy, music, film and history. At its core it lies a horrifying look at the atrocities of the Imperial Japanese Army during World War II, including the silenced suffering of the Comfort Women. Through a mix of historical truth and imaginative storytelling, the play reveals unlikely friendships, rock-solid resilience and the way unresolved justice echoes across generations. Helmed by award-winning writer and director Ramon C. Teñoso, JoMarZeb confronts memory, faith, loyalty, and the shadows of colonial trauma—reminding us that the past never really go... and sometimes, it follows us home.

title: One Foot In The Dark
summary: The answers we are looking for are waiting on the other side of discomfort, challenging norms and stories from the past. One Foot In The Dark is an exploration of our known and unknown experiences of identity, culture and change through text and movement. It is an honest exploration of two artists understanding navigating through life, questions and unknowns. In a world where we are many things at once, how do we say what we need to,…
_description: The answers we are looking for are waiting on the other side of discomfort, challenging norms and stories from the past. One Foot In The Dark is an exploration of our known and unknown experiences of identity, culture and change through text and movement. It is an honest exploration of two artists understanding navigating through life, questions and unknowns. In a world where we are many things at once, how do we say what we need to, when words and bodies speak different languages? Drawing from their distinct practices, poetry and dance, Saili and Divija step into each other’s forms to navigate themes of migration, miscommunication, and belonging. The work reflects on what is lost in translation, and what can still be found when we reach across distance, culture, and discipline. Inspired by the idea of six degrees of separation, this is a search for home: not as a single place, but a shared journey, towards understanding, towards one another, towards a sense of return.

title: Poppies
summary: Johnjoe and Jim clash over the wearing of a poppy. The best friends address what the symbol represents to their respective heritage and attempt to navigate their way through this historic subject matter in relation to their friendship and the British Empire’s devastating, lasting impact in Ireland. This naturalistic conversation develops into surreal hypotheticals that explore autonomy, societal expectations and childhood memories.…
_description: Johnjoe and Jim clash over the wearing of a poppy. The best friends address what the symbol represents to their respective heritage and attempt to navigate their way through this historic subject matter in relation to their friendship and the British Empire’s devastating, lasting impact in Ireland. This naturalistic conversation develops into surreal hypotheticals that explore autonomy, societal expectations and childhood memories. Amidst this, their relationship falters as they both realise they are fundamentally different people. Poppies depicts a modern day tragedy of stubbornness, repressed anger and identity in a time where this lack of footing soft launches so many young men into dangerous ideals.'

From being young and dumb on the Glasgow gay scene, through homelessness on the streets of Barcelona, to being committed to a psych ward and then landing in recovery. It is a tragic yet hilarious true story about overcoming demons and finding the real meaning of what it takes to be happy. Following a smash-hit debut at the Edinburgh Fringe in 2024, Barcelona-based Scottish comedian Iain Anderson has sold out venues across Europe with his unforgettable show. From London and Glasgow to Berlin and Dublin and beyond, audiences have been captivated by a performance that's more than just stand-up—it's a powerful and hilarious rollercoaster of emotions unlike anything else in comedy today. ★★★★★ European Comedy ★★★★ EdFringe Review ★★★★ One4Review Winner of Best Solo Show 2025 at The Clubbie Awards in Barcelona

None of THAT will happen, that’s not what famous comedians do! Join Sam as he tries to tick the boxes, be a 'successful comedian', and understand what it means to be yourself in this modern world.

_description: An A to Z Guide to Dating is a one-woman musical based on a dating book that writer-performer (and Best Newcomer at Musical Comedy Awards) Grace O’Keefe’s mother wrote in the late 80s. Publishers said it would set feminism back 20 years. 40 years later, let’s find out! This theatrical equivalent of a little girl struggling in her mother’s heels, the musical explores relationships, romance and living life to the fullest as a fully grown woman. Featuring original music by Grace O’Keefe (Summoning Sondheim, Sense & Sensibility), the show will leave audiences with a deeper appreciation of their mothers and a chaotic new approach to dating. This is the first preview of the show, which will be premiering with Underbelly at EdFringe 2026.

title: Second Thoughts The Play
summary: When Clement Achebe, a successful insurance manager from Lagos, leaves behind a comfortable life in search of greener pastures in England, he soon discovers that dreams abroad aren’t always as golden as they seem. Through laughter, regret, and raw honesty, Clement shares his journey from boardroom to broomstick, exploring migration, ambition, and the fragile balance between pride and survival. This powerful one-man play blends humour…
_description: When Clement Achebe, a successful insurance manager from Lagos, leaves behind a comfortable life in search of greener pastures in England, he soon discovers that dreams abroad aren’t always as golden as they seem. Through laughter, regret, and raw honesty, Clement shares his journey from boardroom to broomstick, exploring migration, ambition, and the fragile balance between pride and survival. This powerful one-man play blends humour and heartbreak in equal measure, bringing to life the universal struggle of finding meaning far from home. Second Thoughts is a touching exploration of identity, belonging, and the choices that define us, a story for anyone who’s ever wondered if the grass is truly greener on the other side.

title: Chief Petty Officer
summary: Chief Petty Officer is a sharp, visually driven comedy lecture about history’s smallest grudges and the moment they go too far. From imperial overreach to pop culture beefs, stand-up comedian and consumer champion Vix Leyton dissects petty acts that accidentally changed the world, plotting them on an ambitious scientific framework to determine who stopped at the peak – and who disastrously doubled down. Smart, structured nonsense with…
_description: Chief Petty Officer is a sharp, visually driven comedy lecture about history’s smallest grudges and the moment they go too far. From imperial overreach to pop culture beefs, stand-up comedian and consumer champion Vix Leyton dissects petty acts that accidentally changed the world, plotting them on an ambitious scientific framework to determine who stopped at the peak – and who disastrously doubled down. Smart, structured nonsense with bite, insight and a whole lot of laughs. Vix is serious about pettiness, and she has a lot of views to share. Perfect for a BBC Radio 4-leaning brain, history lovers, anyone who has ever briefly considered placing Lego in someone’s shoe, and 50 Cent - he'll love this.

title: Bitch On The Mic Work In Progress
summary: A raw, playful and darkly funny theatre show that cracks open the world of a woman with late-diagnosed ADHD, haunted by the voices that told her she was never enough. Blending clown, character work and storytelling, Jess leads the audience through the chaos of a mind pushed to breaking point and the slow, stubborn climb back to herself. Packed full of sharp humour, surprising tenderness and a host of unruly characters who refuse to…
_description: A raw, playful and darkly funny theatre show that cracks open the world of a woman with late-diagnosed ADHD, haunted by the voices that told her she was never enough. Blending clown, character work and storytelling, Jess leads the audience through the chaos of a mind pushed to breaking point and the slow, stubborn climb back to herself. Packed full of sharp humour, surprising tenderness and a host of unruly characters who refuse to stay quiet. Highly relatable and absolutely ridiculous, this is a show about shame, transformation and the power of speaking the truth out loud. Bitch On The Mic invites you to witness what happens when a woman stops running from her past and steps into the light to dance with it instead. It’s a celebration of resilience, rebellion and the freedom that comes when you finally reclaim your power from your inner critic. Expect a rollercoaster of emotion, powerful messages and insights. Please note: This show is not for the easily offended or faint hearted.

title: Maestroclass
summary: Every performance begins in silence. And it falls to one person, one pair of hands, to call the music into being, to shape it, and finally let it return to the desolation of silence. Meet Maestro, a conducting one-of-a-kind, recently returned from the world's greatest concert halls. Part clown show, part musical experiment! Now he faces his most unpredictable ensemble yet - you! MaestroClass is an hour filled with play, fun and (a…
_description: Every performance begins in silence. And it falls to one person, one pair of hands, to call the music into being, to shape it, and finally let it return to the desolation of silence. Meet Maestro, a conducting one-of-a-kind, recently returned from the world's greatest concert halls. Part clown show, part musical experiment! Now he faces his most unpredictable ensemble yet - you! MaestroClass is an hour filled with play, fun and (a little) audience interaction where harmony and chaos are equally possible. Maestro has a vision. Whether his students share it is another matter entirely. Created and performed by Norwegian actor and clown Karl Magnus Moshuus, the show has already delighted audiences at Glasgow International Comedy Festival, Brighton Fringe, and Edinburgh Fringe last year. Now returning for it's second year at Brighton Fringe! Come unleash your inner virtuoso!

_description: She's peopled her last please, now she's figuring out hey ‘why can’t she be desired’? Why can’t she be naughty? Why can’t she be made out of HDPE plastic? Her exterior’s hard plastic but inside she's stagnant air from 1991. Bex can’t hide behind a toy kitchen mask anymore... she's 5ft8. A fragile woman made entity! Whose masquerading as someone whose normal. But not really. Instead of sharp edges Bex has soft curves, a sturdy base and a small rack. Who is she but a toy kitchen? Join whimsical and (sometimes scary) comedian Bex Turner for a (mostly) stand-up show of weird tales, Autism and lots of crude Crudités! Bex Turner is a high energy, eccentric, surreal, stand up/character comic. Her likeability combined with her comedic sense of adventure makes audiences love her. She was a 2018 Quarter Finalist at Leicester Square New Comedian of the Year and a 2015 Semi Finalist for Laughing Horse New Act of the Year. "certainly very funny was Bex Turner" - Chortle

title: Deluge

After a breakup, one woman tries to keep her thoughts under control... but suddenly she is stuck on ladders, battling Komodo dragons, dealing with leaking ceilings and surrounded by multiplying jam jars. Inspired by over 40 real life stories collected through…
_description: What happens when grief spills into everything around you? Deluge takes the chaos of heartbreak and transforms it into a surreal, funny and unexpectedly tender theatrical journey. After a breakup, one woman tries to keep her thoughts under control... but suddenly she is stuck on ladders, battling Komodo dragons, dealing with leaking ceilings and surrounded by multiplying jam jars. Inspired by over 40 real life stories collected through social media, Deluge weaves real stories with fiction, drawing on clown, movement, dance, live music and video projections to explore grief, healing and the strange ways we cope when life falls apart. Absurd, heartfelt and full of imagination, it turns emotional chaos into something deeply and recognisably human.

summary: Award-winning performer Bola Stephen-Atitebi, recipient of the 2023 Brighton Fringe International Encore Series Award for her performance in Esther’s Revenge, brings her captivating storytelling to Reminiscing with Adunni Alaalo. This 50-minute interactive performance celebrates Nigerian oral traditions, weaving folktales, riddles (alo apamo), folk songs, and live African percussion into a joyful, immersive experience. Rooted in Yoruba…
_description: Award-winning performer Bola Stephen-Atitebi, recipient of the 2023 Brighton Fringe International Encore Series Award for her performance in Esther’s Revenge, brings her captivating storytelling to Reminiscing with Adunni Alaalo. This 50-minute interactive performance celebrates Nigerian oral traditions, weaving folktales, riddles (alo apamo), folk songs, and live African percussion into a joyful, immersive experience. Rooted in Yoruba culture yet drawing connections across Nigeria’s diverse traditions, the show begins with an invocation and audience call-and-response, continues with theatrical storytelling punctuated by African drums, and invites the audience to join in participatory songs and chants. A highlight of the performance is the Reminiscing Circle, where audience members share their own childhood memories, creating a bridge across cultures and generations. After the storytelling, a curated pop-up displays textiles, crafts, and cultural items referenced in the tales.

title: Best In Fringe Comedy The Early Show
venue_name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
summary: It's the very best in Fringe Comedy, in a early evening weekend show! This is a finely selected comedy line-up with an exciting mix of top comedy headliners, the pick of the UK and International comedy circuits and the best performers selected from shows all around the Brighton Fringe. See a bundle of hilarious comics all packed together into this laugh-out-loud and side-splitting hour of comedy featuring five fantastically funny…
_description: It's the very best in Fringe Comedy, in a early evening weekend show! This is a finely selected comedy line-up with an exciting mix of top comedy headliners, the pick of the UK and International comedy circuits and the best performers selected from shows all around the Brighton Fringe. See a bundle of hilarious comics all packed together into this laugh-out-loud and side-splitting hour of comedy featuring five fantastically funny comedians. It's different at every show. You'll see something you weren't expecting, something new and maybe something extraordinary! It's the perfect start to your weekend Fringe night out. See the acts here, and go and see the ones you love again later at thier solo shows aound the Festival. A sell out show internationally! "Enjoy every minute of it... If you haven't been to this show you should make it your priority ★★★★★" (FunnyTonne, Melbourne Comedy Festival) "Rapid-fire comedy. ★★★★" (RIP IT UP, Adelaide Fringe Festival)

Do cats have our interests at heart? Jacob Hatton has been toiling in the joke mines, unearthing a brand new show that takes us back through time and all the way to the end of it all, via Lewisham because whatever journey you make, even through time, the roundabout there is going to be a nightmare. "Proper gags.... Hatton's a strong comedy technician" - Chortle. ★★★★ "Brilliantly British humour"

title: Mr Dodgers Drama Class
summary: Be part of the classroom in this interactive parody drama lesson, leaving you at the mercy of Mr Dodger. Solo debut from Biscuit Barrel founder James Horscroft, David Nobbs Comedy Award finalist and Brighton Fringe Spirit of the Fringe Award 2025 nominee. As seen at Edinburgh Fringe, Hollywood Fringe, and Leicester Comedy Festival, with this show marking his sixth year at Brighton Fringe. Featuring the most unhinged drama games you've…
_description: Be part of the classroom in this interactive parody drama lesson, leaving you at the mercy of Mr Dodger. Solo debut from Biscuit Barrel founder James Horscroft, David Nobbs Comedy Award finalist and Brighton Fringe Spirit of the Fringe Award 2025 nominee. As seen at Edinburgh Fringe, Hollywood Fringe, and Leicester Comedy Festival, with this show marking his sixth year at Brighton Fringe. Featuring the most unhinged drama games you've ever witnessed or, if you're brave enough, participated in. All led by an intensely disciplined performing arts teacher, desperate to make a rundown community college feel like a top-end drama school. Based on a character who's made numerous appearances in "Biscuit Barrel: The 69-Sketch Show", the Dodger is now rolling out of the Barrel and into the classroom.

title: Wit Happens The Comedy Magic Of Katherine Rhodes
summary: Katherine makes her Brighton Fringe debut bringing her sharp humour, wit and incredible magic to the stage of Comedy At The Caxton. She dazzles, sparkles, entertains and mystifies in equal measure. Watch as the laws of physics are cast aside, the impossible is made a reality and your sides split from laughing (not literally!). Her offbeat style of humour and magic will have you talking about this show for the rest of your life (no…
_description: Katherine makes her Brighton Fringe debut bringing her sharp humour, wit and incredible magic to the stage of Comedy At The Caxton. She dazzles, sparkles, entertains and mystifies in equal measure. Watch as the laws of physics are cast aside, the impossible is made a reality and your sides split from laughing (not literally!). Her offbeat style of humour and magic will have you talking about this show for the rest of your life (no guarantee, your mileage may vary, terms and conditions probably apply). “A fresh and unique style. Class act. Funny too!” - Marc Almond “So good I think magic might actually exist” - Heather Peace

_description: Caution: may contain PESKY FEMINIST NUTS.* Kev feels insecure about his ballsack. From weeping about wrinkles, to depression about drooping. Enter Beauty and the Ballsack, a TV makeover show for testicles. Join our contour queen host, Sandra Bollock, for a celebration of these deeply-defamed danglers. This parody of noughties TV makeover shows is for anyone who has ever been made to feel bad, sad or mad about their body by beauty industry bollocks. With a sprinkle of sparkle and a squirt of anti-wrinkle ball cream**, we can: Smash societal scrotum shaming Titillate with testicle facts Blast away beauty ideals that are a load of old bollocks *Interruptions from pesky female nuts WILL NOT be tolerated. This show is a FAN CLUB FOR BALLS, not some kind of FEMINIST NONSENSE. **Disclaimer: Beauty and the Ballsack accepts no responsibility for the irrepressible urge to spend thousands of pounds on beauty products to tighten your testes.

title: A Man Went Into A Shop To Buy A Face
summary: Have you ever started a joke and forgot where it was going? Try pausing it for 41 years... Jimmy Ennis, host of Brighton's longest running new material night "Cool-Aid Comedy" brings you his debut full hour show!! Over a family meal in Dudley, a five-year-old started a classic setup but never delivered the goods. He ate his dinner, grew up, and kept the world waiting. Now, the silence breaks... This is a stand-up comedy show about the…
_description: Have you ever started a joke and forgot where it was going? Try pausing it for 41 years... Jimmy Ennis, host of Brighton's longest running new material night "Cool-Aid Comedy" brings you his debut full hour show!! Over a family meal in Dudley, a five-year-old started a classic setup but never delivered the goods. He ate his dinner, grew up, and kept the world waiting. Now, the silence breaks... This is a stand-up comedy show about the longest set-up in history. The meal is long gone, but will the punchline finally be served? Will the 41 year old delay be worth it? Come for the nostalgia, stay to see if he finally buys that face. As well as regular host of Cool-Aid Comedy, Jimmy has performed at various clubs around the country, including locally Komedia, The Forge & The Comedy Rooms. Komedia New Comedy Act Semi-Finalist 2023, Leicester Square New Comedian Quarter Finalist 2023, Best Decorated Easter Egg Oakham Primary School 1988.

title: Sean Morley Backchannel
summary: The future has arrived, mouth wet and eyes hungry. Elusive comedy cherub and fully adult citizen Sean Morley has reinvented comedy for the slurried minds of Broken Britain. You can say anything these days.
_description: The future has arrived, mouth wet and eyes hungry. Elusive comedy cherub and fully adult citizen Sean Morley has reinvented comedy for the slurried minds of Broken Britain. You can say anything these days.

title: When The Tide Comes In
summary: An original play commissioned by Hungry Wolf Visionary Youth Theatre Company and written by Naomi Denny in collaboration with the young company. As nine young people approach the end of their GCSEs, a celebratory gathering on the beach takes a devastating turn. A singular, defining event inexplicably binds the group, forcing them to grapple questions of collective responsibility and individual guilt. Hungry Wolf VYT represents a new…
_description: An original play commissioned by Hungry Wolf Visionary Youth Theatre Company and written by Naomi Denny in collaboration with the young company. As nine young people approach the end of their GCSEs, a celebratory gathering on the beach takes a devastating turn. A singular, defining event inexplicably binds the group, forcing them to grapple questions of collective responsibility and individual guilt. Hungry Wolf VYT represents a new generation of youth theatre for Sussex’s most promising acting talent aged 14-24 years. With work both thought-provoking and relevant, Hungry Wolf VYT has established a reputation for hard-hitting, truthful and uncompromising material.

title: Disco Of The Damned The Gathering
summary: Join award-winning creatives Lost Hippo for a joyful, cult-themed party night of disco beats, cabaret, comedy and immersive theatre. This high-energy party is led by our charismatic host and self-proclaimed Prophet, and soundtracked by funk and disco all night long. Expect live cabaret acts, playful rituals, and euphoric dancing at one of the Fringe’s most iconic venues. On the surface, Disco of the Damned is a glittering celebration…
_description: Join award-winning creatives Lost Hippo for a joyful, cult-themed party night of disco beats, cabaret, comedy and immersive theatre. This high-energy party is led by our charismatic host and self-proclaimed Prophet, and soundtracked by funk and disco all night long. Expect live cabaret acts, playful rituals, and euphoric dancing at one of the Fringe’s most iconic venues. On the surface, Disco of the Damned is a glittering celebration of disco, funk and joy. But peek behind the curtains and you'll see that this “Disco Cult” has more than meets the eye. Step into the Temple of Confession, be initiated in the Baptismal Ball Pit, or simply dance, watch and soak up the madness. Immersive theatre runs throughout the night, with no pressure to participate — the more you lean in, the more you’ll discover. Brighton's funkiest cult is back, reimagined with more cabaret, more ritualistic madness and even more funk. Come for the disco. Stay for the joy. Leave wondering what you just joined.

title: Enrico Touche Hot Knees Its Just Business
summary: From sold-out cabarets across Europe, Enrico Touché brings their unique brand of comedy to the stage in an hour of unbelievable business. Enrico has a dream: to be the best at business. But what kind of business? Hot Knees is a high-energy comedy about ambition, passion, and following your dreams to their illogical conclusion. Expect briefcases, suitcases, and cases of uncontrollable laughter. For lovers of slapstick and the absurd —…
_description: From sold-out cabarets across Europe, Enrico Touché brings their unique brand of comedy to the stage in an hour of unbelievable business. Enrico has a dream: to be the best at business. But what kind of business? Hot Knees is a high-energy comedy about ambition, passion, and following your dreams to their illogical conclusion. Expect briefcases, suitcases, and cases of uncontrollable laughter. For lovers of slapstick and the absurd — meet Enrico Touché. You will be touched. A cabaret performer combining clowning, trapeze and singing with a magic touch. Enrico has entertained audiences internationally and across the UK’s leading cabaret and theatre venues, including Crazy Coqs (West End), Phoenix Arts, Wonderville, Alberts Schloss, and theatres nationwide with The 100 Watt Club. Recent highlights include sold-out performances at Wales Millennium Centre with Big Band Burlesque and featured artist in Belfast Lyric’s Vaudeville Christmas Show (2024 and 2025).

title: Pseudonym
summary: Part theatre, part spoken word. "Bridget" looks back on her life and contemplates the messy tapestry of experiences that have led her here. She confronts her struggles with body dysmorphia, creative complacency, parasocial relationships, and the brazen decision to move to the UK following a mental breakdown. A raw and intimate look at self-discovery, identity, and the art of becoming. Praise for Deanna Strasse and her work: "Ms.…
_description: Part theatre, part spoken word. "Bridget" looks back on her life and contemplates the messy tapestry of experiences that have led her here. She confronts her struggles with body dysmorphia, creative complacency, parasocial relationships, and the brazen decision to move to the UK following a mental breakdown. A raw and intimate look at self-discovery, identity, and the art of becoming. Praise for Deanna Strasse and her work: "Ms. Strasse is a wordsmith. She grabs the language and does not let it go." -- Krane Reviews, on "Summers in Prague" "Deanna Strasse...has created a brilliant piece that is not only interesting but educational in a fun way." -- GJD Review on "Dead Doves and Lemons..." "Hilarious, great writing, and keeps you on the edge of your seat!" -- Landon Hudson on "The Cafe mocha Murders"

title: The Tale Of The Original Jekyll And Hyde Told By A Mad Hatter From Stockport
summary: Deacon Brodie isn’t that well known out of Edinburgh. Yet he inspired Robert Louis Stevenson to write Jekyll and Hyde. Similarly, Stanley isn’t that well known outside of Stockport. Yet he’s campaigned with Napoleon AND been up Everest with Mallory. Maybe, anyway. By day, in the 18th Century, Deacon Brodie was a respectable cabinetmaker and councillor. Whereas by night, he was a masked burglar in Edinburgh's Old Town. Somehow, Stanley…
_description: Deacon Brodie isn’t that well known out of Edinburgh. Yet he inspired Robert Louis Stevenson to write Jekyll and Hyde. Similarly, Stanley isn’t that well known outside of Stockport. Yet he’s campaigned with Napoleon AND been up Everest with Mallory. Maybe, anyway. By day, in the 18th Century, Deacon Brodie was a respectable cabinetmaker and councillor. Whereas by night, he was a masked burglar in Edinburgh's Old Town. Somehow, Stanley gets roped into his escapades. And he could flipping well swing for it. In public! "Andy D commands the stage with an undeniable presence" The Scotsman.

title: Thats So Sapphic Podcast With Jane Postlethwaite Alexi Melvin
summary: Join social media sapphics Jane Postlethwaite (@JaneDoesComedy) and Alexi Melvin (@TheAlexiMelvin) for a special live recording of the popular hit lesbian podcast, "That’s So Sapphic". A show created exclusively for Brighton Fringe, Jane and Alexi will dive deep into the world of sapphic culture — past, present, and delightfully niche. Growing up with little sapphic representation, they look back at the clues that were always there,…
_description: Join social media sapphics Jane Postlethwaite (@JaneDoesComedy) and Alexi Melvin (@TheAlexiMelvin) for a special live recording of the popular hit lesbian podcast, "That’s So Sapphic". A show created exclusively for Brighton Fringe, Jane and Alexi will dive deep into the world of sapphic culture — past, present, and delightfully niche. Growing up with little sapphic representation, they look back at the clues that were always there, from film and pop culture to those questionable teenage fixations that now make perfect sense. If you're a fan you know that in each episode we explore a new theme as we get to know each other on and off the mic, all while asking the central question: what really makes something sapphic? We'll be selecting a sapphic theme, getting to know our audience and doing a Q&A.

title: Pearl And Dean Ride Again
summary: After a sell out run at Brighton Fringe 2025 and being shortlisted for 3 awards - including best new show - Pearl and Dean are back with a brand new offering! Join the most "heterosexual" couple in show biz, for more high jinks on the high seas. Climb aboard our cruise ship, the Watery Queen, to hear tales of our brief spell in the pop charts with our critically acclaimed album "Separate Beds". Find out which Nashville Ingénue reworked…
_description: After a sell out run at Brighton Fringe 2025 and being shortlisted for 3 awards - including best new show - Pearl and Dean are back with a brand new offering! Join the most "heterosexual" couple in show biz, for more high jinks on the high seas. Climb aboard our cruise ship, the Watery Queen, to hear tales of our brief spell in the pop charts with our critically acclaimed album "Separate Beds". Find out which Nashville Ingénue reworked our greatest hit and made herself a fortune. Delve deep into the private lives of Peter and Marsha and find out just why "Love Will Keep Us Together" even if fame and fortune continues to evade us... Expect new songs, new costumes, new hair and tall tales from the shallow end of showbiz. Join us for an unforgettable evening of singing and swinging aboard the Watery Queen! Pearl and Dean Ride Again - it's a "hull" new world!

title: Aaand Were Back
company: Rich Perry, Kerry Herbert, and Jim Holland
summary: ...again! After 2025's sold out shows in the Brighton Fringe, "Aaand We're Back" ...is back! Two stand-ups and one sit-down in a comedy triple-header of sarcastic observations, filthy one-liners and chronic hilarity. Basically, it's a 50 minute show with three stand-up comedians. Are they funny? Yes. Is there some sort of theme? Kind of. Jim has Long Covid which gives him some new material to try out, but he'll need to sit down.…
_description: ...again! After 2025's sold out shows in the Brighton Fringe, "Aaand We're Back" ...is back! Two stand-ups and one sit-down in a comedy triple-header of sarcastic observations, filthy one-liners and chronic hilarity. Basically, it's a 50 minute show with three stand-up comedians. Are they funny? Yes. Is there some sort of theme? Kind of. Jim has Long Covid which gives him some new material to try out, but he'll need to sit down. Kerry’s back to Brighty after going full circle Downunder on the international comedy circuit. And Rich... had a cigarette break. It’s only a loose theme. Kerry Herbert - “Razor-sharp wit” Latest 7 - Funny Women Brighton winner & national semi-finalist Jim Holland - “Genuine charm” – The Scotsman - “Delectably quirky and inventive” – Fringe Review Rich Perry - So You Think You’re Funny finalist - Chortle Student Comedy Award finalist - Writer for BBC Radio 4 Extra’s Newsjack

title: I Was Dancing In The Lesbian Bar
summary: Welcome to Holly Redford-Jones’ award-winning Lesbian Bar! Part stand-up, part gig, part queer fever dream. This bold new show dances through tales of unsung, unsanitised lesbian debauchery. A sonic love letter to sapphic institutions of a bygone era, it celebrates queer women of the past, present and future with humour, heart, and a dash of disco. Inspired by the cult Jonathan Richman track, Chesterfield local Redford-Jones asks the…
_description: Welcome to Holly Redford-Jones’ award-winning Lesbian Bar! Part stand-up, part gig, part queer fever dream. This bold new show dances through tales of unsung, unsanitised lesbian debauchery. A sonic love letter to sapphic institutions of a bygone era, it celebrates queer women of the past, present and future with humour, heart, and a dash of disco. Inspired by the cult Jonathan Richman track, Chesterfield local Redford-Jones asks the big questions: Where have all the lesbian bars gone? How do you even know when you’re in one? And how did Chesterfield’s Crooked Spire get so... bent?

title: Joz Norris Is Hugh Jackman Is The Phantom Of The Opera
summary: 20 years ago Hollywood icon Hugh Jackman was offered the role of the Phantom of the Opera, a role that award-winning comedy legend and idiot Joz Norris has dreamed about his entire life. He turned it down, and has become a laughing stock. Now, an artist known for taking himself too seriously despite his creative output consisting of utter nonsense will play another one in this musical extravaganza that will reset the course of history.…
_description: 20 years ago Hollywood icon Hugh Jackman was offered the role of the Phantom of the Opera, a role that award-winning comedy legend and idiot Joz Norris has dreamed about his entire life. He turned it down, and has become a laughing stock. Now, an artist known for taking himself too seriously despite his creative output consisting of utter nonsense will play another one in this musical extravaganza that will reset the course of history. Creator and star of BBC Radio 4's The Dream Factory and A Small Talk On Small Talk Winner of the Comedians' Choice Award for Best Show 2019 and the WoW Award for Best Comedy 2025 Two-time nominee for the Malcolm Hardee Award for Comic Originality, Runner-Up for the NextUp Biggest Award in Comedy, and nominee for the Chortle Award for Best Variety Act.

title: Mates The Improvised 90S Sitcom
summary: It’s New York City. It’s the ‘90s. And this is the world’s craziest sitcom. A parody of classic TV such as Seinfeld, Frasier and Friends and completely improvised from your suggestions. Could this show BE any funnier? From some of the comedians behind the award-winning Lying Together and CSI: Crime Scene Improvisation. Best Improv Show Edinburgh Fringe 2022 - Theatre Weekly

title: My Date With Pierce Brosnan
summary: Love life leaving you bored and unfulfilled? Want to be swept off your feet by the sexiest clown in Paris? For one lucky puppet this wish will come true! Mademoiselle Cafetière is lonely and looking for love, until she meets the man of her dreams: Hollywood actor Pierce Brosnan. There's just one catch: Pierce Brosnan is a talking dummy controlled by the audience. Grab your phone and scan the QR code to join in - every message you type…
_description: Love life leaving you bored and unfulfilled? Want to be swept off your feet by the sexiest clown in Paris? For one lucky puppet this wish will come true! Mademoiselle Cafetière is lonely and looking for love, until she meets the man of her dreams: Hollywood actor Pierce Brosnan. There's just one catch: Pierce Brosnan is a talking dummy controlled by the audience. Grab your phone and scan the QR code to join in - every message you type in will be spoken aloud by this lucky dummy. Will he win the heart of our gorgeous heroine before midnight chimes and the spell is broken? Anything can happen in this outrageous love story where you pull all the strings!

title: Lighthouse
summary: It’s not just the past that haunts you. From the producers of recent Edinburgh Fringe 5 ★ smash-hits "Death, the Devil and the Fablemaker" and "Blue Morpho", comes another stormy night to remember. Set in Caillte Lighthouse off the coast of Angus in the North Sea just after WW1, the story follows two keepers and their training of a third before things occur that question their loyalty, friendship and ultimately, their sanity.…
_description: It’s not just the past that haunts you. From the producers of recent Edinburgh Fringe 5 ★ smash-hits "Death, the Devil and the Fablemaker" and "Blue Morpho", comes another stormy night to remember. Set in Caillte Lighthouse off the coast of Angus in the North Sea just after WW1, the story follows two keepers and their training of a third before things occur that question their loyalty, friendship and ultimately, their sanity. LIGHTHOUSE is a gripping twist of a piece that delves into the human psyche of trust, paranoia and greed. With stylish, well-placed humour, jeopardy, suspense and a stellar cast, be prepared to see this sensational piece take the UK by storm. Listed by The Herald as one of the "Top 20 Must-See Shows of EdFringe 2022", LIGHTHOUSE will take you on a 55 minute journey to hell and back like no other. "Rock solid performances and a great sense of atmosphere go a long way to illuminate this new murder mystery thriller!" - The Scotsman

title: Amazing Stories Of Blues And Soul
summary: Ken Wood and the Mixers return to the fabulous Brunswick for one night only, with their fantastic four star Edinburgh Fringe show ‘Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul’. This lively, humorous show tells the story of Soul Music while a cracking eight piece band plays the songs of soul greats like James Brown, Otis Redding and Aretha Franklin. The show features the wild vocals and harmonica of the great Kenneth B Woode, ably supported by…
_description: Ken Wood and the Mixers return to the fabulous Brunswick for one night only, with their fantastic four star Edinburgh Fringe show ‘Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul’. This lively, humorous show tells the story of Soul Music while a cracking eight piece band plays the songs of soul greats like James Brown, Otis Redding and Aretha Franklin. The show features the wild vocals and harmonica of the great Kenneth B Woode, ably supported by the great soul sounds of the might mighty Mixers. So put on your Hi Heel Sneakers, your sharpest suit or your poshest frock and get ready to dance the night away to some of the rockingest Blues, Soul and Ska sounds around. Amazing Stories of Blues and Soul, the most fun you can have with your clothes on!

title: Scott Manley Hadley Bald Personality Disorder
company: scott manley hadley aka SOLID BALD
summary: Scott Manley Hadley aka SOLID BALD has no hair. And no worries. Well, some worries... This alternative comedy WIP performance boasts jokes, sure, but also sequins, thighs, an interactive bald-themed quiz, poetry, costumes, live shaving (risk assessment permitting), original music, and plenty of surprises. To paraphrase Cher, do you believe in life after hair loss? Scott Manley Hadley does, so why not watch as Scott explores body image,…
_description: Scott Manley Hadley aka SOLID BALD has no hair. And no worries. Well, some worries... This alternative comedy WIP performance boasts jokes, sure, but also sequins, thighs, an interactive bald-themed quiz, poetry, costumes, live shaving (risk assessment permitting), original music, and plenty of surprises. To paraphrase Cher, do you believe in life after hair loss? Scott Manley Hadley does, so why not watch as Scott explores body image, mental health, gender, parenting, millennial life, financial hardship, dog ownership and finding hope even when you don't have hair. It can be done! Scott Manley Hadley is a poet turned comedian who has been Highly Commended in the Forward Prizes for Poetry and whose blog, TriumphOfTheNow.com, has been quoted in print in the New Yorker. Scott has appeared as a talking head discussing hair loss on BBC3, Metro online and on the Huffington Post. West End New Act of the Year Semi-Finalist 2025. Bald but not Forgotten.

title: Amelia Hamilton Moral Support Work In Progress
summary: Amelia’s got your coat but she hasn’t pulled. In fact she’s turned, comedy outlaw. Each one of her new rap lines is a deadly bullet in her lyrical revolver. It’s 2026 and we are living in a new wild west where the old rules don’t apply. To put it bluntly she’s sick of doing what you're supposed to. Tired of being told what is right. Her show Moral Support is an electrifying rap manifesto for anyone who has had enough and wants to fight…
_description: Amelia’s got your coat but she hasn’t pulled. In fact she’s turned, comedy outlaw. Each one of her new rap lines is a deadly bullet in her lyrical revolver. It’s 2026 and we are living in a new wild west where the old rules don’t apply. To put it bluntly she’s sick of doing what you're supposed to. Tired of being told what is right. Her show Moral Support is an electrifying rap manifesto for anyone who has had enough and wants to fight back. Saddle up and bring your whisky. Amelia is gonna show you that the good guys were actually the bad girls all along.

title: Not Another Quiz Night
summary: After a hit run at the Edinburgh Fringe and moving to London's Clapham Grand Theatre, Not Another Quiz Night makes it's debut at the Brighton Fringe! Expect music, comedy, mayhem, interactive bonus rounds, ridiculous prizes, surprise appearances. Whether you're a quiz whiz or…
