Waxen Wings' first show in Brighton will leave audiences to ponder on how thin the line between fiction and reality is. A must-see show that will entertain and inform 16+ audiences.

title: Sadomusical
summary: Art is pain. Pain is art. Two “definitely not masochistic” artists take on the challenge of a lifetime: to create musical comedy with feeling—while feeling the real pain of electrocution. In what may be their worst idea yet, veteran musical improvisers Lee Apsey ('CSI: Crime Scene Improvisation,' 'Your Flaws: The Improvised Musical') and Jayda Fogel ('Bird & Tax Collector,' '¡Horario Estelar!') weave hilarious and sincere songs,…
_description: Art is pain. Pain is art. Two “definitely not masochistic” artists take on the challenge of a lifetime: to create musical comedy with feeling—while feeling the real pain of electrocution. In what may be their worst idea yet, veteran musical improvisers Lee Apsey ('CSI: Crime Scene Improvisation,' 'Your Flaws: The Improvised Musical') and Jayda Fogel ('Bird & Tax Collector,' '¡Horario Estelar!') weave hilarious and sincere songs, sketches, and stories with the inspiration of the audience and the threat of being shocked, shackled, dunked, and beaten with a stick. Special guests from the Fringe may also appear to hammer down on their poor life choices. You’ll be shocked, and so will the players—literally. From the award-winning co-creator of multiple Edinburgh Fringe sell-out hit 'CSI: Crime Scene Improvisation.' Artist Accolades: WINNER - The Comedy Award - Colchester Fringe 2024 WINNER - Best Improv/Musical - Leicester Comedy Festival 2023

summary: Who is responsible for the evil in this world? You didn’t choose your family, upbringing or culture. No one had a choice. Not even Hitler. Well, then who is to blame? The universe has played a sick joke on us. If you hear the call, come join me for this psychedelic ritual as we attempt to reach the other side and summon... something. Born out of an accidental exorcism during a shamanic ceremony, 7-7-7 is a one-man ritual-performance…
_description: Who is responsible for the evil in this world? You didn’t choose your family, upbringing or culture. No one had a choice. Not even Hitler. Well, then who is to blame? The universe has played a sick joke on us. If you hear the call, come join me for this psychedelic ritual as we attempt to reach the other side and summon... something. Born out of an accidental exorcism during a shamanic ceremony, 7-7-7 is a one-man ritual-performance that confronts the illusion of free will and our relationship with a Higher Power. It asks what drives people to commit acts of unspeakable evil and if we even have any choice in who we are and what we do. Part confessional story-telling, part seance, this dark comedy blends philosophical inquiry, theological absurdism and the theatricality of ritual. Quick and unpredictable 7-7-7 keeps the audience on their toes as it lightly dances between genres, liminal spaces and through the dark night of the soul.

summary: Take a glimpse back at Victorian life in a house tour which reveals the opulence, taste and lifestyle of a nouveau riche gentleman. Palmeira Mansions are two south facing terraces built 1883-4, these large Victorian properties are on the north side of Palmeira Square in Hove. Number 33 Palmeira Mansions was purchased in 1889 by Arthur William Mason at the age of twenty-nine, a widower after the tragic death of his first wife, he moved…
_description: Take a glimpse back at Victorian life in a house tour which reveals the opulence, taste and lifestyle of a nouveau riche gentleman. Palmeira Mansions are two south facing terraces built 1883-4, these large Victorian properties are on the north side of Palmeira Square in Hove. Number 33 Palmeira Mansions was purchased in 1889 by Arthur William Mason at the age of twenty-nine, a widower after the tragic death of his first wife, he moved into the house with a young daughter Christine. In his early years living in the house Mr Mason used the family fortune to refurbish the interior in a lavish eclectic mix of fixtures, including elaborate fireplaces some with stunning overmantels, carved mahogany doors, a variety of lincrusta wall papers and exquisite stained-glass windows were added to various rooms. 33 Palmeira Mansions is now part of the English Language Centre in Hove. 33 Palmeira Mansions is on the corner of Salisbury Road & Church Road, Hove BN3 2GB. Note there are many stairs.

_description: Join the Story Baker for a magical, immersive experience as we make and break bread together around the fire. The Story Baker has a wonderful recipe. It’s as old as time, yet it’s still made, every day, in people’s homes the world over. The ingredients? A traditional folk tale with many twists and turns; a willingness to join in (everyone in the audience can participate) and, of course, YOU! Our expert fire chefs from Woodfire Camping will help you cook your creation over the fire before we sit to share and break bread together. This enchanting and hands on show shares traditional tales from around the world and is about cooking, sharing, contributing and friendship. Please read before booking: Due to the nature of this event children must be accompanied by an adult. 1 adult to no more than 2 children. No child under 18 will be admitted unless accompanied by an adult. All ingredients supplied - flour and fire will be present; gluten-free options available.

title: Science Magic Messy Mayhem

summary: Ignite young imaginations and nurture a lifelong love of science with Science Magic —a high-energy, interactive comedy experience designed for children aged 5 to 12. Created and performed by a comedian and zoologist who has delighted audiences in over 20 countries, this show combines clever science tricks with laugh-out-loud moments, all using everyday objects kids can find at home. _description: Ignite young imaginations and nurture a lifelong love of science with Science Magic —a high-energy, interactive comedy experience designed for children aged 5 to 12. Created and performed by a comedian and zoologist who has delighted audiences in over 20 countries, this show combines clever science tricks with laugh-out-loud moments, all using everyday objects kids can find at home. Each performance demystifies scientific concepts, encouraging children to see themselves as budding scientists who can experiment, explore, and discover on their own. Science Magic is more than entertainment; it’s an accessible gateway to curiosity and learning, priced affordably so that every child, regardless of background, can experience the wonder of science. Let’s inspire the next generation of scientists by showing them that magic is real—when you understand the science behind it!

title: Gerry Carroll Young 2
summary: An Ordinary Man, A Hero of the Land of the Young. A solo clown odyssey written and performed by Gerry Carroll (age 73 and not slowing down). Long ago, the warrior-poet Oisín rode off with the golden-haired Niamh to Tír na nÓg – the Land of the Young, where time stands still. Three hundred years later he came home... and instantly turned into a wrinkly old man. Gerry has a soul-crushing office job, discovers clown and comedy, and…
_description: An Ordinary Man, A Hero of the Land of the Young. A solo clown odyssey written and performed by Gerry Carroll (age 73 and not slowing down). Long ago, the warrior-poet Oisín rode off with the golden-haired Niamh to Tír na nÓg – the Land of the Young, where time stands still. Three hundred years later he came home... and instantly turned into a wrinkly old man. Gerry has a soul-crushing office job, discovers clown and comedy, and explores what it’s like when you slowly turn into a wrinkly old man. What happens when we leave the Land of the Young? In this joyous and unexpectedly moving hour, Gerry weaves the ancient Irish legend of Oisín with his own life story – with song, dance, clowning, stand-up, a few too many shot glasses, and buckets of laughter. It’s funny. It’s touching. Because growing old is inevitable, but growing up is optional. Be 21 again! Bring your granny, bring your inner child, bring a shot glass if you dare. Book now – seats are going faster than Oisín’s youth!

_description: Undercooked is a Work in Progress stand-up split bill featuring Sara Lessmann and Stephanie Bradshaw. Lessmann, a 2025 West End New Act of the Year Finalist, brings a whimsical, endearing style of comedy rooted in storytelling . Her set explores life as a queer late bloomer raised in the USA, in a buttoned-up religious home. Bradshaw, a finalist in the 2023 OnlyFans Creative Comedy fund, debuted her 45-minute show Big Fish at the 2024 Edinburgh Fringe, reflecting on growing up in a sleepy Cumbrian town with an outsized desire for stardom. Toby Hadoke (XS Malarkey) praises her “warm, likeable” presence and “lovely timing". Notts Comedy Review noted the show’s feel-good charm. In Undercooked, Lessmann and Bradshaw dig into the deeper meaning of being small-town people-pleasers. Come see this preview from two rising comics!

title: Clear One Size Fits One
summary: Get making, get curious, and explore the science behind asthma, eczema and allergies! Join us for a hands-on workshop where families can explore children’s health research through playful, imaginative activities. Designed for families with children aged 0–14, the space invites young learners and their grown-ups to step into the role of the expert, discovering allergic conditions in fun and accessible ways. You’ll get to make your own…
_description: Get making, get curious, and explore the science behind asthma, eczema and allergies! Join us for a hands-on workshop where families can explore children’s health research through playful, imaginative activities. Designed for families with children aged 0–14, the space invites young learners and their grown-ups to step into the role of the expert, discovering allergic conditions in fun and accessible ways. You’ll get to make your own puppet patient as you move through a series of learning stations, picking up ideas about allergy symptoms, triggers and all the different things that shape how someone experiences their condition. No two puppets are the same. Neither are children. Together, we’ll explore why health journeys differ and why care needs to adapt to these differences too. Brought to you by a team of researchers, doctors and artists, this is a welcoming space to learn, imagine and connect. Whether you live with these conditions or are simply curious, come get stuck in.

title: Custard Club
summary: Five women. Four decades. Twenty tins of custard. One delicious secret. Custard Club tells the story of Nancy, a young woman whose fraught search for queer community pushes her to the most sensible solution she can muster: summoning four women from across the twentieth century to her kitchen table for an unforgettable evening of passive aggression, genuine aggression, impromptu drag numbers and custard fights. As euphemisms and…
_description: Five women. Four decades. Twenty tins of custard. One delicious secret. Custard Club tells the story of Nancy, a young woman whose fraught search for queer community pushes her to the most sensible solution she can muster: summoning four women from across the twentieth century to her kitchen table for an unforgettable evening of passive aggression, genuine aggression, impromptu drag numbers and custard fights. As euphemisms and costumes slip to reveal hidden identities, Nancy realises that the cost of community is not the ignorance of difference, but the celebration and nurture of genuine authenticity. At times, Custard Club is a poignant look at queer costuming, coding and community-building, at others a campy, raucous spectacle. There are many fingers in many pies. Dubbed fondly as the lovechild of Top Girls and 5 Lesbians Eating a Quiche, Custard Club is a heart-wrenching, trans-historical, egg-based romp. Why not pull up a chair?

Michael Brunström is a surrealist comedian based in London. He has created numerous full-length solo shows, including “Parsley”,…
_description: Medieval Swiss folklore meets Artificial Intelligence in this surreal version of the William Tell legend from incomparable absurdist Michael Brunström. Can the hunter and marksman William Tell take on the might of Austrian Imperialism (AI)? Down with tyranny! Death to the algorithm! Freedom for Switzerland! Michael Brunström is a surrealist comedian based in London. He has created numerous full-length solo shows, including “Parsley”, “The Great Fire of London” and “World of Sports”. His show “Copernicus Now” was nominated for the 2024 Best Show Award at the Leicester Comedy Festival. He’s a winner of the Malcolm Hardee Award for Comic Originality and a member of the Weirdos Comedy Collective.

_description: The Pavilion Gardens Cafe History Tour, led by local historian Geoffrey Mead, takes visitors on a rich journey through the heart of Brighton's cultural and social past. We begin at the cafe in the Royal Pavilion Gardens. The tour highlights the cafe origins in the 1920's, its role as a community hub, and its evolution across three generations of family ownership. Blending architectural insight, local anecdotes and stories of everyday Brighton life. The tour offers a warm engaging look at how the Pavilion Gardens Cafe became a cherished landmark in the City. At the end of the tour you will be offered tea or coffee with cake and a chance to ask questions and have a chat with fellow tour guests.

title: Bound By The Wind Echoes Of The Past
summary: What really happened on the day Mulan laid down her sword? Bound by the Wind: The Echoes of the Past returns to the legendary warrior at the moment history skips over — the night the war ends, when victory no longer gives answers. As Mulan confronts a captured enemy and the loyalty of those closest to her, the play narrows its focus to a single turning point: a decision that will cost lives, break faith, and redefine what heroism truly…
_description: What really happened on the day Mulan laid down her sword? Bound by the Wind: The Echoes of the Past returns to the legendary warrior at the moment history skips over — the night the war ends, when victory no longer gives answers. As Mulan confronts a captured enemy and the loyalty of those closest to her, the play narrows its focus to a single turning point: a decision that will cost lives, break faith, and redefine what heroism truly demands. This new version strips back the epic scale of previous productions to explore the human cost behind the myth — not the battles fought, but the choice to stop fighting. Blending stylised stage combat, physical storytelling, and an immersive soundscape, Bound by the Wind offers an intimate reimagining of a legendary figure caught between duty, identity, and freedom. Created by a multicultural team of emerging artists, the production invites audiences to witness the woman behind the war god — and the moment she chooses to leave.

Watch as a cast of quick-thinking improvisers blend the best of short-form chaos like lines from a hat and Party Quirks, with the intrigue of a long-form whodunit. Expect wild characters, ridiculous twists, and plenty of unscripted moments. Will we solve the crime, or just…
_description: Who killed the plot? Well, it was definitely one of us... but can you figure out who? Join us for a hilariously unpredictable improvised murder mystery with a twist! Watch as a cast of quick-thinking improvisers blend the best of short-form chaos like lines from a hat and Party Quirks, with the intrigue of a long-form whodunit. Expect wild characters, ridiculous twists, and plenty of unscripted moments. Will we solve the crime, or just make things even more absurd? There's only one way to find out, come see the mystery (and the madness) unfold!

title: The Spiegeltent Swing Thing
summary: Slip on those dancing shoes, blow away the bank holiday blues and dance till you drop in the iconic Tivoli Spiegeltent. Swing is king on the afternoon of the 24th May and we hope you'll join us for an afternoon of great dance tunes in the coolest of venues. Yes, the Spiegeltent is back and we hope you'll be there to help us celebrate Brighton's love of swing music.

title: Classy
summary: Eva-Jade Andrews (So you Think You’re Funny Semi-finalist 2025, Komedia New Comedian of the Year Semi-finalist 2026) and Chiff Powell (winner of mild mannered tax advisor of the year – this may not be an actual award) come from different backgrounds. Eva-Jade is fiercely proud of being working class. Chiff is painfully embarrassed of being middle class. Join them and some special guests for an hour of comedy where they may consider if it matters if you fill the kettle to the top before boiling it or whether your boiling water tap needs upgrading. Or, they may just tell some great jokes and you’ll have an amazing time and not really care what class people are just as long as they remain classy.

title: Posey Mehta Asking For It
summary: Posey Mehta is a submissive and a masochist. And they are asking for things they have no legal right to ask for. You must decide whether to give them what they want, even if that means breaking the law. In this powerful protest against the Spanner Ruling and the Domestic Abuse Act 2021, Mehta submits their body to the audience and asks them to hurt it. What follows is a surprisingly tender, joyful, and wholesome dismantling of so many…
_description: Posey Mehta is a submissive and a masochist. And they are asking for things they have no legal right to ask for. You must decide whether to give them what they want, even if that means breaking the law. In this powerful protest against the Spanner Ruling and the Domestic Abuse Act 2021, Mehta submits their body to the audience and asks them to hurt it. What follows is a surprisingly tender, joyful, and wholesome dismantling of so many of the tired stereotypes that exist around kink. Following in the tradition of--but ultimately subverting--Marina Abramovic's Rhythm 0 and Yoko Ono's Cut Piece, this bold new piece of participatory performance art offers a window into a world where violence isn't cruelty, but care. Mehta is an "unhinged" (Ed Fringe Review) award-winning live artist, blending drag, clown, and performance art. As their drag alter-ego Mitzi Fitz (K Factor season 2 winner), they run the sell-out sensation Big Fat Cabaret, London's best (and only) fat-centric cabaret.

As a member of the society, you are privy to astonishing secrets and command powers beyond all imagination. But as you enter the chambers for the weekly meeting, all is not as it seems. mysteries unravel, rifts form, and the wrong choice could mean the end of the society itself. So you’d better make the right decision...no…

title: Flightless Birds
summary: Flightless Birds is a split stand-up bill featuring weird little freak Sammer Elzubaidi and big little freak Ramsey Smith. Sammer is the tallest guy at the small-guy convention. His subversive style stands out in the conventional crowd. His favorite movie is Surf’s Up. Ramsey does comedy the same way he makes love — into a microphone. His blend of storytelling and observational bits makes him surprisingly smart for a dumb guy — though…
_description: Flightless Birds is a split stand-up bill featuring weird little freak Sammer Elzubaidi and big little freak Ramsey Smith. Sammer is the tallest guy at the small-guy convention. His subversive style stands out in the conventional crowd. His favorite movie is Surf’s Up. Ramsey does comedy the same way he makes love — into a microphone. His blend of storytelling and observational bits makes him surprisingly smart for a dumb guy — though don’t let that fool you, he’s dumb. He’s a RAW Comedy NSW State Finalist (2024), has performed at Top Secret Comedy, and has opened for Rory Lowe. His favorite movie is The Godfather Part III. Now they’re teaming up for Flightless Birds, a split bill that’s about to rattle the UK comedy scene. Separate, they’re two of the most exciting new faces in UK comedy. Together, they will rule the world.

summary: Sure, Anna was born the old-fashioned way - an all-powerful Supreme Being spontaneously deposited in a perfect female human body who immediately fell in love with the first man she saw. But what happens to your average Supreme Being once you’ve saved the world, done the laundry and the years have rolled by? Anna Leong Brophy (How to Train Your Dragon, Shadow & Bone, one half of sketch duo EGG) takes a joyful frolic through the male gaze (yum), aging (gross) and sexy, sexy sci-fi, all while covered in blue goo.

summary: Join this up-and-coming comedy duo for an hour of riotous laughs, whacky characters, quick-fire sketches and some groovy tunes. Who do you trust in a moment of crisis? The relevant emergency services or a couple of newly-certified, haphazard and rather chaotic busybodies? The second one. Obviously. They have whistles. Armed with a high-vis vest, half a tinfoil blanket and an unwavering air of authority, these Designated Fire Wardens…
_description: Join this up-and-coming comedy duo for an hour of riotous laughs, whacky characters, quick-fire sketches and some groovy tunes. Who do you trust in a moment of crisis? The relevant emergency services or a couple of newly-certified, haphazard and rather chaotic busybodies? The second one. Obviously. They have whistles. Armed with a high-vis vest, half a tinfoil blanket and an unwavering air of authority, these Designated Fire Wardens promise to take you on a slightly mad journey filled with absurd characters, surreal musical interludes and plenty of totally gleeful comedy. Seriously, this is not a drill. Straight from Soho Theatre’s Character Comedy Lab and off the back of sold-out performances in London, Durham, Leeds and Bristol, this is an unmissable debut hour of sketches from the ‘ridiculously talented’ (EdFringe Review) duo, Alannah and Phoenix, named by Chortle as ‘one to watch’. From the winners of Best Sketch Show at Edinburgh Fringe 2025 (Derek Awards).

title: Son Of Dave The Electro Blues Shack
summary: Blues — but not as you know it. The legendary Son of Dave returns to the UK for a rare live performance at the Electro Blues Shack, Caravanserai. From the wilder edges of foot-stomping Americana to gritty electro-blues we’re reviving our infamous club that was a resident at The Green Door Store for many years. Headlining is Son of Dave, a one-man blues phenomenon (Benjamin Darvill, formerly of Crash Test Dummies) whose hugely…
_description: Blues — but not as you know it. The legendary Son of Dave returns to the UK for a rare live performance at the Electro Blues Shack, Caravanserai. From the wilder edges of foot-stomping Americana to gritty electro-blues we’re reviving our infamous club that was a resident at The Green Door Store for many years. Headlining is Son of Dave, a one-man blues phenomenon (Benjamin Darvill, formerly of Crash Test Dummies) whose hugely influential looping harmonica, beatbox grooves, stomping rhythms and growling vocals have earned cult status — from soundtracking Breaking Bad and Preacher to appearances on Later... with Jools Holland. Support comes from Brighton’s Country Ties, bringing their blend of country, bluegrass and Americana with rich harmonies and barn-dance energy. Between sets, DJs including Nick Hollywood (Electro Blues/White Mink) and The Chairman spin vinyl blues and vintage cuts. Live blues, country, Americana and bluestronica - the perfect way to close the Fringe weekend.

Each event presents a different lineup of artistic magic, so settle in at Lost in the Lanes with a glass of something good and let yourself be stirred, soothed, & inspired. This is Sunday done properly. Warm, soulful, unmissable. "Dillon-Reams is poetry in motion, heady, soul-searching, and emotionally real. Boundless energy, humanity & humour." YOURHARLOW

Serving up Fag Packet’s signature mix of comedy, physical theatre and drag, in a hilarious takedown of multi-level marketing schemes and the horrors of ruthless heteronormativity. _description: COME AND SEE THE SHOW OF YOUR LIFETIME. It’s my (LOZ DODD) show - a special show like NO other. DIFFERENT EVERY TIME. Powerful. Urgent. What even is this? Where are we going? How do we know what’s real? COME. You’ll leave changed - GUARANTEED. In his quest to make sense of everything, Loz discovers he knows nothing. In his unraveling, he searches for meaning with what’s left: himself, a room, and the people in it. This Can’t Be It is a semi-improvised, feverish and open-hearted exploration of how we stay open to mystery (and to each other) in the midst of uncertainty and collapse. Directed by Lara Ricote Rachael Dobbie on tech

title: Burn Baby Burn La Inferno
summary: LA is burning. When a pair of old Angelenos lose everything, they must navigate overwhelming grief, toxic ash and paperwork purgatory, surrounded by clueless celebs, soulless politicians and insurance vampires. 6000 miles away, their (very) anxious daughter is trying hard not to unravel. Fringe Theatre Awards 2x nominee Burn Baby Burn is a stripped-back, sharp-witted mix of storytelling, satire and songs, exploring the human cost of…
_description: LA is burning. When a pair of old Angelenos lose everything, they must navigate overwhelming grief, toxic ash and paperwork purgatory, surrounded by clueless celebs, soulless politicians and insurance vampires. 6000 miles away, their (very) anxious daughter is trying hard not to unravel. Fringe Theatre Awards 2x nominee Burn Baby Burn is a stripped-back, sharp-witted mix of storytelling, satire and songs, exploring the human cost of climate change and the humans fanning the flames. Asking questions nobody wants to answer like: why was LA’s biggest reservoir empty? What the hell is a ‘firenado’? And how did 80s icon Steve Guttenberg become a low-key hero? With a childhood shaped by wildfires and her parents home destroyed in January 2025's blaze, Hunter's done what any good performer would do...turned her heartbreak and existential dread into a hilarious and heartbreaking show. Following her acclaimed debut solo show, in partnership with Slackline Productions, champion of women 35+.

summary: Not a lot has been written about the decade 'the nineties' and so Adam Larter will FINALLY try to get to the bottom of what happened in this decade. _description: When Jen discovers an underground lair of alien creatures with plans of world domination, she must do everything in her power to thwart their efforts before undercover extraterrestrial ‘Beryl Stump’ is elected the next UK Prime Minister. With the help of Princess Diana’s diary and the noble efforts of her wonderful audience, Jen might just make it. This anarchic comedy blends puppetry, pop-culture parody and a deep love for Princess Diana to create a fast paced and delightfully absurd performance. It's not one to be missed. ★★★★ "It rings with soul and sensation." - Binge Fringe for Halfway Down's previous production 'Saint'.

title: Crying In The Bulldog On A Thursday
summary: He studies climate collapse while she studies River Phoenix's filmography; they're both obsessed with things that are dying or dead. He raves in muddy fields. She's an arty, tattooed creative who thinks the outside is where you go to get back inside. A comedy about loving someone completely wrong for you, wondering if you want a baby, plastic straws and Net Zero.

_description: A Drop of Brandy with Friends is back for its fourth year at Brighton Fringe. Hosted by the one and only Sister Brandy Bex, this is where comedy gets real, bold, and unforgettable. Each show brings you two to three top-notch acts—sometimes polished, sometimes delightfully obscure, but always side-splitting. It’s not just a show; it’s a staple. Brandy’s banter, razor-sharp wit, and her handpicked line-up make this a must-see event. Expect laughter, unexpected gems, and a night you’ll talk about long after the Fringe. Don’t miss this comedy institution!

I’m talking life, love, loss, finding your way and pigeons... quite a lot about pigeons actually... it’s pretty pigeon-heavy to be honest. So please join me, Toussaint Douglass, for an hour of joyfully absurd, charmingly awkward stand-up. Besties Debut Award 2025 Winner ISH Edinburgh Comedy Awards 2025 Longlist NextUp’s Biggest Award in Comedy 2025 Nominee Edinburgh Festival 2025: What To Watch New York Times

_description: The "Rock n’ Roll St. Brigid," Áine Duffy is a "horsebox hero" (Today FM) redesigning the stage. Her movement, "Don’t Touch My Knob" (DTMK), storms Brighton Fringe with an all-female night of comedy, music, and fun. Join three powerhouse Irish women for a defiant, high-energy show. Championed by Ed power in the UK Independent alongside Kneecap and CMAT, Áine’s presence is "like Dave Grohl gate-crashing an Irish protest rally. "Come for the craic, stay for the noise. Shinanne Higgins is a rising star of Irish comedy. Her solo show "10 Things They Hate About Me" sold out at Edinburgh Fringe in '24 and '25, Ireland's Best New Act. Meljoann is a multi-disciplinary. Their self-formulated hyperjack sound has soulful vocals against spiky lyrics; lush synths against industrial noise. She’s a member of the Spirit of Gravity experimental music collective in Brighton, she’s been supported by Deb Grant and Gemma Bradley at BBC6Music and BBC Introducing.

title: Prop Roulette
summary: Compilation show where a range of comedians will be tested on their improv ability by trying to incorporate randomly assigned props as best as possible into their routine. Prize for best/most innovative use of a prop. Hosted by Matt Male.

_description: Cabaret Boheme is back at Brighton Fringe 2026! Join us on 24th May for a fabulous night dripping in feathers, tassels, and unapologetic sass. Studio 4 All Dance brings its students to the Cabaret Boheme stage in a dazzling celebration of self-expression because everyone deserves to feel fierce and unleash their inner show diva. Expect men in heels, high glamour, and deliciously high camp, with appearances from Brighton legend Dave the Bear and the irresistible burlesque babe Allegra Rose. The night is hosted by powerhouse performers Veronica Blacklace and Chris Hide, serving vocals, charisma, and pure cabaret magic. Add Purple Haze’s gravity-defying spectacle, and you’ve got a show that’s bold, brilliant, and bursting with attitude. Cabaret, Boheme Confidence. Chaos (the fabulous kind). Brighton, this one’s unmissable.

title: The Goth Father
summary: “Revenge is a dish best served GOTH” Back-comb your hair, apply the purple lipstick and pull up your fishnet tights. _description: “Revenge is a dish best served GOTH” Back-comb your hair, apply the purple lipstick and pull up your fishnet tights. Lads, brace yourselves for an evening of comic mayhem, as the most deluded man in rock returns to become the legend he knows he always should have been. In 1983, Athos Dark created Gothic Rock with his band The Leeds 6. Now, after 40 years in the wasteland, The Gothfather is back. And you are invited to the launch of The Leeds 6’s new greatest album: Exile. “If Syd Barrett did comedy, it would be The Gothfather” - Andy Thomas, Des Kapital With special guest bass player: Crow Maggie.

title: Who Wrote This

_description: After a whirlwind run across six Fringe Festivals and eleven different shows, ‘Who Wrote This?’ returns to Brighton Fringe 2026! Get ready for an hour of unpredictable improvised comedy where your suggestions drive every scene and anything can happen! Audiences last year raved that the shows were ‘hilarious, high-energy and brilliantly unpredictable.’ With every moment made up on the spot, no two performances are ever the same. Join the chaos, fuel the fun, and help create a show that will only happen once. Don’t miss it!

_description: Cult comedy pioneers Stepdads present the world’s first ever stage adaptation of Victor Hugo’s novel. They will be joined by alternative comedy’s finest to faithfully adapt this colossal epic, including the 58 page digression on the Battle of Waterloo. Previous acts include: Mark Silcox, Joz Norris, Josh Glanc, Elf Lyons, Lorna Rose Treen, Christian Brighty and more! Stepdads are BAFTA-winning Disney+ heartthrob Luke Rollason (★★★★ “gloriously daft” Telegraph) and The Flop’s Tom Penn (★★★★★ “Nothing happens” BeyondTheJoke).

_description: Rabbie Burns' Bottom Drawers A musical comedy in one act. A riotous musical comedy uncovering the scandalous side of Robert Burns. What happens when Scotland’s national bard’s naughtiest works are dragged out into the open? Set in 1796, just after Burns’ death, his unsuspecting housekeeper stumbles upon a hidden stash of very explicit poetry and lyrics. Naturally the local literary society decides there’s only one thing to do... put on a public reading! You, the audience, become the 18th-century townsfolk, invited to enjoy Burn's shocking and hilarious poetry like 'The Fornicator' alongside some surprisingly beautiful songs like 'My Love is Like a Red, Red Rose. Performed by Christine Weir and Cameron Robertson with musician Shahrukh Mubashir and directed by Clare Stopford, this raucous playlet gleefully mixes period drama with modern musical flair — featuring keyboard, acoustic guitar and saxophone in defiance of historical accuracy.

title: Normans Big Day Out
summary: Norman is an unassuming, exhausted, and hapless man who charms the audience with his inability to perform mundane tasks and then wows them with extraordinary skill.​ Out to make a delivery the house is nowhere to be found, so with no other option he delivers to himself. _description: Norman is an unassuming, exhausted, and hapless man who charms the audience with his inability to perform mundane tasks and then wows them with extraordinary skill.​ Out to make a delivery the house is nowhere to be found, so with no other option he delivers to himself. Come see Norman and watch the ordinary become extraordinary as he explores his new home through a delightful mix of acrobatics and antics. Every day is different for Norman so you never know what he'll get up to, he might juggle his lunch, stand on his hands, flip through the air or even lasso a wild horse. There's more than enough adventure for everyone so come join Norman both in the audience and maybe even on stage for a show you'll never forget.

title: Vibrations From Mars
summary: Vibrations from Mars is a space-themed guided storytime meditation show that takes you on a journey through the cosmos. Led by certified yoga & sound meditation instructor and drag artist Gaylien de Mars, you'll be teleported around the universe, visiting distant planets before returning safely back to Earth. This is an immersive, sensory experience with live sound textures from crystal bowls, koshi chimes, tuning forks, steel drums…
_description: Vibrations from Mars is a space-themed guided storytime meditation show that takes you on a journey through the cosmos. Led by certified yoga & sound meditation instructor and drag artist Gaylien de Mars, you'll be teleported around the universe, visiting distant planets before returning safely back to Earth. This is an immersive, sensory experience with live sound textures from crystal bowls, koshi chimes, tuning forks, steel drums and ethereal vocals, along with visual elements to help keep you in the stars. Explore how vibration is experienced as sound and sensation, helping to relax the nervous system and rest. Explore the deep connection humanity has with the cosmos. This experience is crafted with *accessibility and neurodivergent comfort in mind, and is a safe space for the LGBTQIA+ community. No yoga experience needed – just curiosity, and a willingness to float through an otherworldly, soothing adventure. *the venue is accessed via 1 step and is not wheelchair accessible.

title: Mark Daniels Thats Terrifying Can We Brunch Now
summary: 81% of millennials say they can't afford a mid-life crisis, but So You Think You’re Funny finalist, Mark Daniels, is asking... what if they’re just pretending they aren't having one? And what if they’re just not trying hard enough to have one on a budget? He’s found brilliant ways of coping with a whole range of existential anxieties from environmental apocalypse to the replacement of humankind by AI, with simple things, like…
_description: 81% of millennials say they can't afford a mid-life crisis, but So You Think You’re Funny finalist, Mark Daniels, is asking... what if they’re just pretending they aren't having one? And what if they’re just not trying hard enough to have one on a budget? He’s found brilliant ways of coping with a whole range of existential anxieties from environmental apocalypse to the replacement of humankind by AI, with simple things, like bottomless brunch and ridiculous jackets. And he doesn’t blame himself – why didn’t our school days prepare us for this sh*t instead of teaching us non-stop about Henry the f*cking Eighth? Following his sell-out Brighton Fringe show Acute Britishness, this late-30-something queer comedian is back delivering his satirical, self-deprecating wit about all sorts of important topics from AI to Shakespeare to the Sugababes. It’s a show for anyone who’s ever spent £12 on smashed avocado on toast and thought... wow... what in the God’s f*ck am I doing with my life?

_description: Good evening, esteemed delegates, and welcome to the inaugural National Dad Conference - exploring the big questions about what it means to be a father today and celebrating those who excel in the field. We know you were expecting a rendition of Bertie Hodd’s 5 star, award-winning, genre-resisting show ‘Dad Jokes’ but due to a recent third-life crisis, they have decided to throw their toys out of the proverbial pram and instead retire from fatherhood to walk the Camino de Santiago. (Like father, like drag artist). So, please join us for the last time to celebrate the fatherliest of figures as we give him the send off he deserves (lots of booing and telling him he was a shit dad anyway). Conference agenda to be sent out shortly. Audience dress code: your finest Dad attire. Socks and sandals are highly encouraged. Expect special guests.

title: Cohabitors
summary: Cohabitors explores the emotional terrain of shared living. Connection, closeness, conflict, and the quiet isolation that can exist even when we live side by side. Through a performance blending acrobatics, body percussion, and live music, we reflect on the tension between intimacy and disconnection in cramped, high-pressure living situations. The piece was inspired by moving to London for university. Stepping into a fast-paced city…
_description: Cohabitors explores the emotional terrain of shared living. Connection, closeness, conflict, and the quiet isolation that can exist even when we live side by side. Through a performance blending acrobatics, body percussion, and live music, we reflect on the tension between intimacy and disconnection in cramped, high-pressure living situations. The piece was inspired by moving to London for university. Stepping into a fast-paced city where high rent forces people to live in tight spaces. In these conditions, minor issues can grow quickly, and even small interactions carry weight. It asks: What does it really mean to live together? This is Clamber’s first work combining circus, live music, and community-led storytelling. With backgrounds in classical music, circus arts, and digital sound, our artists bring fresh perspectives that challenge convention and invite audiences to engage with circus in a new way.

_description: Do you have a problem? Struggling to know where to turn? Bring your dilemmas to this comedy show, where real life strippers hold space, listen carefully and offer free, non-judgemental life advice to all. Stacey Clare (creator of hit Fringe show "Ask A Stripper", author of "The Ethical Stripper" and cast member of "The Illicit Thrill") and friends are on a new mission to bring empathy, compassion and understanding out of the strip club and onto the stage. These unshockable, hardened and world-weary women have been giving free therapy to men in strip clubs for years, so what better way to share their wealth of knowledge and experience by helping others overcome their guilt, shame and neuroses. All dilemmas are anonymous as these atypical agony aunts understand completely the importance of discretion. So if you're looking for help and need a safe space with a friendly face... come share your load with a couple of sex workers. Laughter, wisdom and sage advice guaranteed.

title: Improbotics Presents Artificial Reality
summary: Improvised show where audiences become producers and join the cast on the stage. With questionable methods, AI, wild characters, and deep fake celebrities, we sabotage reality TV. A fast-paced high-tech satire of AI slop and voyeurism from Improbotics, the award-winning pioneers of robot theatre. Led by an Executive Producer host, the crowd chooses setting, contestants, prize, and celebrities who turn up. 6 contestants compete for…
_description: Improvised show where audiences become producers and join the cast on the stage. With questionable methods, AI, wild characters, and deep fake celebrities, we sabotage reality TV. A fast-paced high-tech satire of AI slop and voyeurism from Improbotics, the award-winning pioneers of robot theatre. Led by an Executive Producer host, the crowd chooses setting, contestants, prize, and celebrities who turn up. 6 contestants compete for audience love. Because of budget cuts, "celebrities" must be recreated using our own questionable "artificial reality" methods (state-of-the-art deep fake, voice cloning, image and video generation, and special AR glasses to send lines from a chatbot to control the "celebrity" actor). As improvisers transform into contestants and get eliminated, replaced, or rebooted by AI, the show becomes a hilarious exploration of improv and reality TV mashed together, and a subtle critique of capitalism and of the rise of AI in entertainment.

title: Darryl J Carrington Tennish
summary: Darryl J Carrington is a physical comedian and mostly non-verbal clown who loves messing around with objects, timing and visual gags. He has been making playful, inventive shows for over twenty years, rooted in physical theatre and contemporary circus. His previous show, Out of the Box, won Best Family Friendly Show at Brighton Fringe 2025 and went on to a highly acclaimed run at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe 2025, with critics calling…
_description: Darryl J Carrington is a physical comedian and mostly non-verbal clown who loves messing around with objects, timing and visual gags. He has been making playful, inventive shows for over twenty years, rooted in physical theatre and contemporary circus. His previous show, Out of the Box, won Best Family Friendly Show at Brighton Fringe 2025 and went on to a highly acclaimed run at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe 2025, with critics calling it “utterly absorbing, charming and great fun.” Audiences loved his ability to connect across ages using inventive physical comedy. TENNISH is Carrington’s first fully adult comedy show, premiering at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe 2026. It starts as a tennis show before quickly going off-court, as rackets, balls and towels become instruments, obstacles and punchlines. Playful, chaotic and visual, TENNISH explores ambition, performance and big dreams — this time firmly for adults.

title: Planted
summary: A chaotic, brutally honest one-woman show about turning 30 before you’re ready, navigating modern dating, and trying to tick your way to happiness with a doomed to-do list. From smear tests and vibrators to disastrous run-ins with exes and painfully cringe first dates, she throws herself into “self-improvement” with the unearned confidence of a woman spiralling beautifully. But running through it all is one stubborn basil plant: half-…
_description: A chaotic, brutally honest one-woman show about turning 30 before you’re ready, navigating modern dating, and trying to tick your way to happiness with a doomed to-do list. From smear tests and vibrators to disastrous run-ins with exes and painfully cringe first dates, she throws herself into “self-improvement” with the unearned confidence of a woman spiralling beautifully. But running through it all is one stubborn basil plant: half-dead, slightly judgemental, and impossible to throw away. As the list starts to unravel, the comedy gives way to something deeper—a story about grief, friendship, and the unexpected things we cling to when life won’t go to plan. Funny, filthy, and quietly devastating, if all goes to plan...

This is Madeleine's recount of misadventures to a soap opera degree of tea, and a love letter to the gays and girlies, for their supportive voice notes, loud karaoke sessions, and endless gig pig behaviour at live…
_description: 'Who the F*$% is Madeleine?' Not only Lily Allen's hit song, but the question Madeleine has grappled with through years of living abroad, navigating Irish and French culture, and messing up her romantic life fantastically. This is Madeleine's recount of misadventures to a soap opera degree of tea, and a love letter to the gays and girlies, for their supportive voice notes, loud karaoke sessions, and endless gig pig behaviour at live music events, showing her time and time again where the healthy love is. Madeleine Munford is a stand-up comedian and actress originally from New York, who is currently based in London, England. Known for her honest storytelling, with as sharp as a whip comedic timing and a dry wit, Madeleine is a rising star on the London comedy scene. Before her relocation, Madeleine performed as the resident MC and producer for Icarus Comedy Club and Friday Night Live. Madeleine has performed as the support act for David McSavage and Bobcat Goldthwait.

title: Sing Sign And Sensory

Inside these gentle, glowing spaces, your baby can explore a soothing blend of music, simple storytelling and interactive animations—all crafted to spark early communication, bonding and joyful…
_description: Step into a world designed especially for your little one. Sing, Sign & Sensory invites babies (0–24 months) and curious young sensory seekers into magical, purpose-built inflatable pods where their very first creative adventures begin. Inside these gentle, glowing spaces, your baby can explore a soothing blend of music, simple storytelling and interactive animations—all crafted to spark early communication, bonding and joyful discovery. Each workshop is thoughtfully inclusive and easy to enjoy, offering families a relaxed way to introduce their baby to the wonder of theatre. With soft projections dancing overhead, tiny breezes from fans, textured props to grasp, and safe, comforting scents filling the air, every moment encourages your little one to engage, respond and connect. Whether it’s their first time reaching for a new texture, following a floating light or signing along to a song, Sing, Sign & Sensory creates memories you’ll treasure.

_description: ★ Brighton Fringe Comedian of the Year 2026 ★ The Brighton Fringe Comedian of the Year competition is a key platform for identifying outstanding emerging stand-up talent. Bringing together comedians from across the UK circuit, the competition showcases strong original material, assured stagecraft and distinctive comic voices. Through a series of semi finals where the act with the largest audience vote with go through and one act that is chosen by an industry professional guest judge. one act is ultimately selected as the standout comedian of Brighton Fringe 2026 with two other placing gaining valuable industry recognition and profile at one of the UK’s leading comedy festivals. There are 6 Semi Finals in which 2 acts will go through from each with the Final being a 12 act double bill on Sunday 31st

title: Babel Beast
summary: Babel Beast is an experimental, multi-lingual cabaret of monstresses, made by and for mythical creatures of Ancient Greece. Whether repurposing pop culture, childhood nostalgia or mythic storytelling, this explosive one-woman spectacle is familiar yet strange, energising yet intimate, and fundamentally “a love letter to speaking many languages” (audience response). Natoli explores her multiculturalism and lived experiences of…
_description: Babel Beast is an experimental, multi-lingual cabaret of monstresses, made by and for mythical creatures of Ancient Greece. Whether repurposing pop culture, childhood nostalgia or mythic storytelling, this explosive one-woman spectacle is familiar yet strange, energising yet intimate, and fundamentally “a love letter to speaking many languages” (audience response). Natoli explores her multiculturalism and lived experiences of (un)belonging in between cultural spaces - herself divided between Italy, France and the UK - hoping to leave you with more questions than when you arrive! Cabaret lovers and Greek myth fanatics alike are invited for a night of frightening and seductive, strange and reflective encounters. From the Siren's song, to Medusa’s sharp tongue, to Lamia's ritual - the Sphynx has a wild line-up waiting for you...

title: Aiteach
summary: Wine Dog presents their debut work, ‘AITEACH’, a performance packed with energy, physicality and a heavy pinch of homosexuality. This dynamic contemporary choreography tackles deeply personal themes including limitations, control versus creative outlet, and gender-dysphoria. Powered by our lived experiences of queerness and neurodivergency, Wine Dog have developed a physically engaging performance that explores the joy of moving in a…
_description: Wine Dog presents their debut work, ‘AITEACH’, a performance packed with energy, physicality and a heavy pinch of homosexuality. This dynamic contemporary choreography tackles deeply personal themes including limitations, control versus creative outlet, and gender-dysphoria. Powered by our lived experiences of queerness and neurodivergency, Wine Dog have developed a physically engaging performance that explores the joy of moving in a body you don't necessarily feel comfortable in. The choreography stems from the influence of grounded contemporary dance movement which pushes the body to its limits as well as influence from queer clubbing and 70s disco. Striking a balance between intense physicality and humour, “AITEACH” is a powerful, high-energy piece that leaves the audience smiling, showing how powerful feeling “other” can be.

title: Flesh And Bone Play
summary: Flesh and Bone is THE multi-media, dark comedy for anyone who relishes 2015 Tumblr, trauma dumping, and drone music. **Missing people from the 1960s/70s inter-communal Cypriot conflict are returning as zombies, disrupting borders and creating havoc, but not for Muppet-Joker. He's more concerned about how moving to Cyprus has landed him with emo siblings, Sage and Milton, divided by religious trauma, and their leader, Athena, who thinks…
_description: Flesh and Bone is THE multi-media, dark comedy for anyone who relishes 2015 Tumblr, trauma dumping, and drone music. **Missing people from the 1960s/70s inter-communal Cypriot conflict are returning as zombies, disrupting borders and creating havoc, but not for Muppet-Joker. He's more concerned about how moving to Cyprus has landed him with emo siblings, Sage and Milton, divided by religious trauma, and their leader, Athena, who thinks she is a vampire spiritually connected to Gerard Way.** **Combining a real Tumblr drama from @Muppet-Joker with the fiery question of how we can move forward from silent tragedies, Flesh and Bone investigates how the roots of neo-colonialism sprout in Tumblr.com. **

title: Jonny Woo Suburbia
summary: Jonny Woo's latest personal show, Suburbia, about his life from the suburbs of Kent to the queer scene in London and the sex clubs of New York received rave reviews and the Brighton Fringe Award for Excellence at The Edinburgh Fringe, 2025. Blending story-telling, drag, song, spoken word and burlesque, this is easily his most revealing show yet, in more ways than one. Now in his fifties, Jonny reflects back at the people and moments…
_description: Jonny Woo's latest personal show, Suburbia, about his life from the suburbs of Kent to the queer scene in London and the sex clubs of New York received rave reviews and the Brighton Fringe Award for Excellence at The Edinburgh Fringe, 2025. Blending story-telling, drag, song, spoken word and burlesque, this is easily his most revealing show yet, in more ways than one. Now in his fifties, Jonny reflects back at the people and moments that made him the man and the performer he is today. He grew up in The Medway Towns and found drugs and the club scene in the early 1990's before exploring his drag alter ego in NYC at the turn of the Millennium. Memories of his first sexual experience and his first "drag" inspiration echo like ghosts throughout and amongst the wild confessions he confronts his fears and triumphs in this unique coming of age story. The presence of a mysterious suburban "cross-dresser" permeates his narrative in a show which is as much a feast for the eyes as for the soul.

title: The Eric Tinker Experience
venue_name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
summary: Aussie/pommie stand up and musical comedian Eric Tinker brings his “bloody weird and so much fun” ‘Ericsperience’ to Brighton, for one show only! Between eccentric gags he raps as MC Boomer, sings a love song to Margaret Thatcher, appears as a meditating cow and more. Also Eric will be ‘reading the mind’ of an audience member and improvise a song from their thoughts! How wrong can that go? Eric has performed successful shows at the…
_description: Aussie/pommie stand up and musical comedian Eric Tinker brings his “bloody weird and so much fun” ‘Ericsperience’ to Brighton, for one show only! Between eccentric gags he raps as MC Boomer, sings a love song to Margaret Thatcher, appears as a meditating cow and more. Also Eric will be ‘reading the mind’ of an audience member and improvise a song from their thoughts! How wrong can that go? Eric has performed successful shows at the Adelaide, Edinburgh, Perth (WA) and Brisbane Fringes over the last seven years. He has appeared in clubs, pubs and festivals around Australia and in his native England. His style is influenced by the likes of Spike Milligan and The Bonzo Dog Band. "His songs, like Philosophy, are brilliant, dripping with double entendres and fantasy.” The Barefoot Review. “Eric Tinker is blessed with a keen sense of the ridiculous.” The Clothesline. "Eric's show is really bloody weird and so much fun!" Kate Rudge, Bris Funny Fest director.

title: The Small Stuff
summary: Daniel Tizon offers a forensic dissection of daily life’s minor agonies, from dealing with a chatty new neighbour to accepting, aged eight, dancing wasn’t for him, concluding that the extroverted demands of flair, gestures and exaggerated facial expressions were a technical impossibility for his understated persona. He explores, with equal scrutiny, the fraught etiquette of the adult education college urinal, specifically the moment a…
_description: Daniel Tizon offers a forensic dissection of daily life’s minor agonies, from dealing with a chatty new neighbour to accepting, aged eight, dancing wasn’t for him, concluding that the extroverted demands of flair, gestures and exaggerated facial expressions were a technical impossibility for his understated persona. He explores, with equal scrutiny, the fraught etiquette of the adult education college urinal, specifically the moment a classmate you’ve never spoken to in class attempts to initiate the breakthrough conversation while positioned next to you at the trough. Of all the places to finally bond, the gents’ feels like a questionable choice. It's all a social minefield.

title: Strange Face Adventures With A Lost Nick Drake Recording The Story Continues
summary: An unforgettable storytelling experience that blends mystery, humour and genuine emotional punch. In his original acclaimed award-winning solo show, Michael Burdett recounted the true tale of how he stumbled upon a long-lost Nick Drake recording — a discovery that would have been remarkable enough on its own. The story now takes an unbelievable turn in this updated new version of the show when, against all odds, Burdett uncovers a…
_description: An unforgettable storytelling experience that blends mystery, humour and genuine emotional punch. In his original acclaimed award-winning solo show, Michael Burdett recounted the true tale of how he stumbled upon a long-lost Nick Drake recording — a discovery that would have been remarkable enough on its own. The story now takes an unbelievable turn in this updated new version of the show when, against all odds, Burdett uncovers a second lost Drake recording. Armed with the first recording, Burdett travelled across the UK, inviting strangers in shops and living rooms, on mountains and street corners to listen. Their reactions, funny, moving, and profoundly human, became the heart of an adventure that reveals why Drake’s music still resonates so powerfully. Through vivid storytelling, arresting photographs, and warm, sharply observed humour, Burdett crafts a deeply engaging atmosphere. Featuring on-screen revelations from James Acaster and others. Coincidences abound.

In 2013, it happens: he's cast in "Wir rocken Barcelona", a bona fide German “Glee”. With 5 other talented teens, Alexis is whisked off to Spain to film 8 episodes and countless music videos. Child stardom is in sight! Then it all goes downhill: turns out, it's a reality show, and Alexis…
_description: What if you got the opportunity of a lifetime... in your tweens?? At age 15, Alexis dreams of escaping rural Germany and becoming a famous singer. In 2013, it happens: he's cast in "Wir rocken Barcelona", a bona fide German “Glee”. With 5 other talented teens, Alexis is whisked off to Spain to film 8 episodes and countless music videos. Child stardom is in sight! Then it all goes downhill: turns out, it's a reality show, and Alexis notices he’s different from the rest of the group... or rather, not different enough. Between in-cast beef and problematic producers, Alexis grapples with being a minor on national TV, all while holding onto his biggest secret... With new original songs and unearthed footage, join acclaimed musical comedian Alexis Sakellaris (A STAN IS BORN!) as he dives into his past to share the cringiest moments of his LIFE. Previous work: ★★★★ THE STAGE Musical Comedy Award Nominee 2026 Brighton Fringe Best New Show Award Nominee 2025 Tour support Matt Rogers, Emma Holland

summary: All sensibilities have been torn down, and your sanity is next. title: Fringe Academy Equity 101
summary: The Brighton & Sussex branch of Equity is the local voice of your union. Chaired by local actor Carole Bremson, we are a vibrant community of professional performers and creative workers across theatre, film, television, radio, variety, and more. As part of the UK’s trade union for the performing arts and entertainment industry, we represent, support, and advocate for our members throughout Sussex. We host regular monthly meetings,…
_description: The Brighton & Sussex branch of Equity is the local voice of your union. Chaired by local actor Carole Bremson, we are a vibrant community of professional performers and creative workers across theatre, film, television, radio, variety, and more. As part of the UK’s trade union for the performing arts and entertainment industry, we represent, support, and advocate for our members throughout Sussex. We host regular monthly meetings, events, workshops, and campaigns to strengthen our industry, promote fair working conditions, and build a supportive network for local talent. Whether you’re a seasoned professional or just starting out, we’re here to help you thrive. Come along and meet us to find out more about Equity and the work we do. Fringe Academies are free to attend and are designed to help Artists make the most out of their Brighton Fringe experience!

title: Flufflin The Shooting Star
summary: Have you ever wondered what your true gifts might be - or how to find them? Flufflin and the Shooting Star is a tender, magical immersive tale that invites children and adults to drift into the world of dreams and self-discovery. Meet Flufflin, a quiet little creature who lives tucked away in a loft and holds a secret: he can see people’s dreams shimmering in the dark. Yet even with such a gift, Flufflin feels unsure of his own…
_description: Have you ever wondered what your true gifts might be - or how to find them? Flufflin and the Shooting Star is a tender, magical immersive tale that invites children and adults to drift into the world of dreams and self-discovery. Meet Flufflin, a quiet little creature who lives tucked away in a loft and holds a secret: he can see people’s dreams shimmering in the dark. Yet even with such a gift, Flufflin feels unsure of his own purpose. What is he meant to do? What hidden talents belong to him? One night, everything changes. A Shooting Star appears, offering three gentle steps to help him understand his path. But the journey that follows takes an unexpected turn - opening a space for audiences to reflect on their own special gifts and the meaning they bring to the world. A dreamy, poetic story that nurtures children’s confidence, self-belief, and the courage to follow their dreams.

_description: Courtney thought moving to England would be a breeze, considering she is from Canada and speaks the same language? Or do we? Mad isn't mad, and it isn't oregano, it's oreGAWno. Courtney takes us on a journey through her isolation, rejection sensitivity and homesickness while she tries to navigate a class system coming from a country that has no class, trying to de-code passive aggressiveness all while raising a an ND family, ageing and finding new love-the budget version of course.

title: Rubys Glowup Drag Makeup Tutorial Workshop
summary: Ever fancied achieving a fierce and fabulous drag look? _description: Ever fancied achieving a fierce and fabulous drag look? Join Rubella Vaxine for a 4-hour fun packed tutorial to discover your inner Drag Diva as she paints her face step by step for you to follow along, talking you through her favourite products and techniques. The workshop is designed for anyone interested in the art of drag for beginners (no previous knowledge needed), enjoy an afternoon of transformation including a free glass of bubbly on arrival. Make up, brushes and drag style false eye lashes are provided (some items will be for shared use), you are more than welcome to bring your own makeup if you would prefer and if you would like to bring a ring light, please feel free. Basic memory aid resource to takeaway to practice with. Photo opportunity at the end of the session with fun wigs provided, and if you would like to bring any sparkly numbers to change into that would be fabulous! Once finished, why not slay the night away out on the town - Book now for an unforgettable time!

title: Pleasure Incorporated
summary: What if sex workers could get drunk at the office Christmas party? Had colleagues they could gossip with? Went to performance reviews with their managers? What would it be like if the oldest profession in the world was just a regular office job? Drawn from Jemima’s lived experience of escorting in Berlin and as a survivor of childhood sexual abuse (CSA), this lyrical one-woman play is an insightful, witty and sensitive exploration of…
_description: What if sex workers could get drunk at the office Christmas party? Had colleagues they could gossip with? Went to performance reviews with their managers? What would it be like if the oldest profession in the world was just a regular office job? Drawn from Jemima’s lived experience of escorting in Berlin and as a survivor of childhood sexual abuse (CSA), this lyrical one-woman play is an insightful, witty and sensitive exploration of one woman’s route to selling sex; what it means for her to do the work and how that spools out into her friendships, relationships and society. Set in the cubicles and corridors of an imagined corporation, bringing together live performance and video art, Pleasure Incorporated is a funny, tender, surreal and compelling examination of Jemima’s search for answers; how to heal from childhood trauma, and how to gain bodily and financial autonomy in a hostile world.

title: Sex Drugs And Dnb
summary: In England, the drug related death rates have been on the rise since 2011. A rising problem that needs to be understood... and what better way to understand than to listen to a girlie telling you about addiction AND recovery? An autobiographical show. Showcasing poignant, real world stories from the bottle and beyond. Be among the first people to witness a recovering addict turn their experience into art (a solo performance). Trust me,…
_description: In England, the drug related death rates have been on the rise since 2011. A rising problem that needs to be understood... and what better way to understand than to listen to a girlie telling you about addiction AND recovery? An autobiographical show. Showcasing poignant, real world stories from the bottle and beyond. Be among the first people to witness a recovering addict turn their experience into art (a solo performance). Trust me, its going to be one hell of a ride... some would even say an emotional rollercoaster. Get ready to laugh.. Maybe cry and vibe to some banging drum and bass tunes. We collectively have the power to positively affect the rising problem of drug and alcohol related death rates... because stigma is a killer... ‘Beatrice turns her journey of loss and hardship into a fearless celebration of resilience and hard won joy’ - Esme Davis (Freelance director) Be part of the movement destigmatising addiction and recovery, but most importantly, let's party!

title: Meat
summary: After a sell out tour in 2025, MEAT comes to Brighton fringe; a brilliantly bold, tour-de-force performance, hilariously funny, profoundly emotional, a powerhouse production. In an age of patriarchy, where women’s bodies are commodified objects, MEAT is an electrifying roar of fury, a rallying cry of protest, a unifying celebration of strength packed with heroism & heart. Shame breeds in silence, this show gives a safe space to roar,…
_description: After a sell out tour in 2025, MEAT comes to Brighton fringe; a brilliantly bold, tour-de-force performance, hilariously funny, profoundly emotional, a powerhouse production. In an age of patriarchy, where women’s bodies are commodified objects, MEAT is an electrifying roar of fury, a rallying cry of protest, a unifying celebration of strength packed with heroism & heart. Shame breeds in silence, this show gives a safe space to roar, for anyone who’s got a body. Follow ‘A girl’ from age 9 into her 30s, detailing her journey through puberty, misogyny, and identity. A solo performer, but a story that is all of ours. Based on verbatim accounts. MEAT is a playful and poignant exploration of identity. A dirty dive into the foundations of power, an injection of a new narrative. A theatrical hybrid of poetry, clowning, cabaret and dance featuring original music written by multi-award winner Elle Dillon-Reams.

title: The Rime Of The Ancient Mariner
summary: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner and other salt-stained shanties A blustering theatrical blunder through brine, blood and ballads. Framed around the themes of Coleridge’s famous epic, two troubadours fumble their way through a number of short stories, songs and poems on a quest to find the emotional truth of the sea. Including retellings of true shipwrecks, selkie folktales and of course The Rime itself, this is an entertaining evening…
_description: The Rime of the Ancient Mariner and other salt-stained shanties A blustering theatrical blunder through brine, blood and ballads. Framed around the themes of Coleridge’s famous epic, two troubadours fumble their way through a number of short stories, songs and poems on a quest to find the emotional truth of the sea. Including retellings of true shipwrecks, selkie folktales and of course The Rime itself, this is an entertaining evening not to be missed!

title: Paul Silverthorne Lso Plays Recent Works For Viola By Magnus Lindberg Brett Dean And Poul Ruders
summary: Join us for a thrilling evening with internationally acclaimed violist Paul Silverthorne and pianist Roderick Chadwick. Described by The Times as “a virtuoso in sensitivity and technique,” Paul Silverthorne has built an exceptional career that balances international solo performances with principal viola roles in two of London’s most distinguished ensembles: the London Symphony Orchestra and the London Sinfonietta. A passionate…
_description: Join us for a thrilling evening with internationally acclaimed violist Paul Silverthorne and pianist Roderick Chadwick. Described by The Times as “a virtuoso in sensitivity and technique,” Paul Silverthorne has built an exceptional career that balances international solo performances with principal viola roles in two of London’s most distinguished ensembles: the London Symphony Orchestra and the London Sinfonietta. A passionate advocate for contemporary music, Silverthorne has inspired leading composers to write specifically for him, drawn to his expressive range and fearless artistry. Partnering with him is the remarkable pianist Roderick Chadwick, hailed in Fanfare as “an incredibly musical pianist", in a programme featuring works by Magnus Lindberg, Brett Dean, Poul Ruders, and other significant voices of our time. Together, they create a musical experience of intensity and striking modernity. Expect a night of bold colours, daring rhythms, and unforgettable performances.

title: All My Ex Lovers Are Dead
summary: "all my ex-lovers are dead" is what you get when you drink a million mugs of tea and collage the diaries from your teen years across your bedroom wall like that meme from “It's Always Sunny In Philadelphia”; uncomfortably familiar but somehow reassuring. And a promise: even if it doesn't get better, at least it gets funnier. An all-too-honest, mostly autobiographical reflection on desire, the pitfalls of pity sex, poor life choices,…
_description: "all my ex-lovers are dead" is what you get when you drink a million mugs of tea and collage the diaries from your teen years across your bedroom wall like that meme from “It's Always Sunny In Philadelphia”; uncomfortably familiar but somehow reassuring. And a promise: even if it doesn't get better, at least it gets funnier. An all-too-honest, mostly autobiographical reflection on desire, the pitfalls of pity sex, poor life choices, why love is like potatoes, and how many cups of tea it takes to wake up and smell the coffee. A play for the Tumblr girlies, our younger selves, and the gals you meet in the bathrooms along the way. Previously selected for Artscape’s New Voices Programme (2021), STAND Foundation’s Pen To Paper Programme (2022), Toyota SU Woordfees (2023), the National Arts Festival’s Curated Programme (2024), Cape Town’s inaugural Heat Festival (2024), and Johannesburg's POPArt’s Next Draft programme (2025).

title: Progress In Work
summary: Ever wondered what NHS nursing’s really like? Join Sister Brandy Bex on a riotous journey through NHS madness. From dating doctors to dodging disaster, she’s turning it all into comedy gold. Outrageous stories, parody songs, and a camp spectacle—nursing’s never been this wild!
_description: Ever wondered what NHS nursing’s really like? Join Sister Brandy Bex on a riotous journey through NHS madness. From dating doctors to dodging disaster, she’s turning it all into comedy gold. Outrageous stories, parody songs, and a camp spectacle—nursing’s never been this wild!

title: Will Davies Heroic Scale Work In Progress
summary: It's a big, scary world out there and it's easy to feel small and helpless in the face of it all. But is that true? Can just one little thing make a big change? Does every little help? Can you really make a mountain out of a molehill? Who's to say? Join Will Davies as he attempts to find out in this new hour of fresh stand-up comedy. (Work in progress).

Harry and Ollie are lifelong friends and working-class caterers, trying to survive one last chaotic service before the wrap party begins. As A-list egos flare, inspections loom and impossible coffee orders stack up, their tiny van becomes a pressure cooker. Multi-rolled by two performers, the show blurs the line between performance and reality as Harry clings to the business he’s built, while Ollie dreams of escaping catering for an acting career that always feels just out of reach. When Ollie is suddenly offered a real audition in the most surreal and morally dubious way imaginable, hope collides with loyalty, and their friendship starts to fracture. Fast, funny and rooted in real film-set experience, Wrap Party is a lightning-quick comedy about invisible labour, ambition and class.

title: Julie Baby
summary: Julie Baby is hungry. So hungry she might eat someone. A former star swimmer, she spends her days empty and alone, thinking about her past and missing her brother. That is until her new man gives her the name ‘Julie Baby’. Equipped with a new name and identity, she is determined to feel full again - no matter what it takes. Julie Baby is the story of obsession, loss and just how far we’ll go to feel whole.
_description: Julie Baby is hungry. So hungry she might eat someone. A former star swimmer, she spends her days empty and alone, thinking about her past and missing her brother. Julie Baby is the story of obsession, loss and just how far we’ll go to feel whole.

Fresh off the runways of Camden Fringe 2025, Rosebuds Comedy Festival 2025 and Boomtown Fair 2024, we find wannabe socialite-model ‘Hot Mess’ at her first ever MET Gala. Poses are struck, bowels are loose and dreams are crushed faster than you can say nepotism. After a VERY public embarrassment on what was…
_description: 'GEORGIA POLLY-TAYLOR: VERY HOT. VERY MESSY.' takes you on a grungy gondola trip through the kaleidoscopic sewers of celebrity. Fresh off the runways of Camden Fringe 2025, Rosebuds Comedy Festival 2025 and Boomtown Fair 2024, we find wannabe socialite-model ‘Hot Mess’ at her first ever MET Gala. Poses are struck, bowels are loose and dreams are crushed faster than you can say nepotism. After a VERY public embarrassment on what was meant to be the night of her dreams, Hot Mess goes on a journey through the drains of shame and self-discovery to find her place in the world. Part absurd clown, part catwalk diva: Georgia Polly-Taylor’s remarkably eccentric character celebrates the often disastrous reality of being human.

title: International Poetry Festival
summary: 3-days of radical & queer multi media spoken word performances expoloring darkness, desire and revolt, an electrifying celebration of contemporary poetry at Brighton Fringe, organized by the Institute for Experimental Arts (Greece, UK, Tunisia, India, USA, Lebanon, Germany) In an era defined by rapid change and digital noise, spoken word has re‑emerged as one of the most vital artistic forms of the 21st century — a space where truth,…
_description: 3-days of radical & queer multi media spoken word performances expoloring darkness, desire and revolt, an electrifying celebration of contemporary poetry at Brighton Fringe, organized by the Institute for Experimental Arts (Greece, UK, Tunisia, India, USA, Lebanon, Germany) In an era defined by rapid change and digital noise, spoken word has re‑emerged as one of the most vital artistic forms of the 21st century — a space where truth, identity, and collective memory are voiced with urgency and emotional force. The artists featured in this festival represent a global spectrum of poetic expression, blending performance, activism, storytelling, and experimental sound to confront the realities of our time. Their work spans themes of social awareness and personal transformation, demonstrating how spoken word continues to shape cultural discourse and empower communities.

title: As The Winds And Waters Are
summary: If you brought together four unrelated characters from four separate novels by one author, what dynamics would unfold? What experiences and perspectives would spark warmth, empathy, or compassion between them, which miscomprehension or conflict? Would they be drawn to one another, or find themselves in hostile confrontation? Anthony, Jackie, George, and Ralph, each with strong connections to Hove and Brighton, gather at Patrick…
_description: If you brought together four unrelated characters from four separate novels by one author, what dynamics would unfold? What experiences and perspectives would spark warmth, empathy, or compassion between them, which miscomprehension or conflict? Would they be drawn to one another, or find themselves in hostile confrontation? Anthony, Jackie, George, and Ralph, each with strong connections to Hove and Brighton, gather at Patrick Hamilton’s final Norfolk seaside home on September 23rd, 1962, in a liminal space between the author's life and death. Each character can only speak from the historical and social perspective in which Patrick set them, but with his own historical insight, how does Patrick himself respond to their interactions? In taking leave of their creator and of each other, there are promises, reassurances, resolutions, and ends left dangling— some ominous...

title: Catgpt Scratch Rebuild
summary: CatGPT is the hilarious true tail of how a Welshman resurrected his cat Lentil 10 years after he died with robotics, custom AI, a synthesiser and lots more. L3NT1L is now reborn as a travelling life coach, offering profound (and sometimes useless) advice to crowd questions via his unique feline AI. Having been nominated for Best New Show at Brighton last year L3NT1L is aiming for a full-body makeover in time for his return. In this…
_description: CatGPT is the hilarious true tail of how a Welshman resurrected his cat Lentil 10 years after he died with robotics, custom AI, a synthesiser and lots more. L3NT1L is now reborn as a travelling life coach, offering profound (and sometimes useless) advice to crowd questions via his unique feline AI. Having been nominated for Best New Show at Brighton last year L3NT1L is aiming for a full-body makeover in time for his return. In this all-new version he promises a wild new kitty synthesiser (in conjunction with Orbital’s Phil Hartnoll) and neon whiskers. CatGPT is unlike anything else on earth and has wowed audiences from Edinburgh Fringe to Cheltenham Science Festival as well as chaotic tours to Japan, New Zealand and Australia. It’s an all-improvised feel-good show peppered with some poignant moments, neurodiverse logic and a hint of science. This year there’s also a special all-ages “kitten version” for younger cat fans. Bring your life questions, leave questioning everything!
