title: This Is Philosophy
summary: Part Lecture. Part Stand Up. And Part Lecture. Join Professor Morgan Morganthaller, lecturer in contemporary semiotics at Burton-on-Beans University and recent divorcee, for a night of academic rigour and cultural intrigue. Past lectures include: Duality of self: Can it ever be Man AND Muppet? Forgettable Deniable: Masculinity in the philosophy of Katy Perry. The Bill Passed: Understanding the affects of Brexit on Geese. Professor…
_description: Part Lecture. Part Stand Up. And Part Lecture. Join Professor Morgan Morganthaller, lecturer in contemporary semiotics at Burton-on-Beans University and recent divorcee, for a night of academic rigour and cultural intrigue. Past lectures include: Duality of self: Can it ever be Man AND Muppet? Forgettable Deniable: Masculinity in the philosophy of Katy Perry. The Bill Passed: Understanding the affects of Brexit on Geese. Professor Morganthaller’s new lectures will tear the mask from contemporary culture, and gaze into its meaty meaty face. Expect revelations that will shift the fabric of society as we know it. Stationary will be provided.

title: Lollipops
summary: Lollipops is a short, impactive comedy play telling the story of a night out that we all know too well. Two young women. Best friends, flatmates, frequent schemers. Together, they are taking on all the trials and tribulations of a big night out. Fresh off the back of a break-up, Pops is looking for a good time, meanwhile Rubes has some demons she must conquer along the way. Join them as they embark on a clubbing adventure, helped by an…
_description: Lollipops is a short, impactive comedy play telling the story of a night out that we all know too well. Two young women. Best friends, flatmates, frequent schemers. Together, they are taking on all the trials and tribulations of a big night out. Fresh off the back of a break-up, Pops is looking for a good time, meanwhile Rubes has some demons she must conquer along the way. Join them as they embark on a clubbing adventure, helped by an intricate game plan, strategic tequila shots, and a sweet treat for the road. Can these besties secure the night out of their hopes and dreams, or are they destined for a big fat cry in the toilets? Tricera Collective is a new Birmingham based theatre company, composed of young artists making contemporary, relatable theatre. The company writes, produces and performs original plays offering a comedic insight into the lives of young, creative people. Tricera makes their Brighton debut with Lollipops, a play to make you laugh, cry, think, laugh again!

title: Around Asia In 7 Dishes
summary: Around Asia in 7 Dishes Thursday 28th May | Blossoms Cocktail Bar, Brighton Blossoms Cocktail Bar invites you to an intimate evening of refined culinary exploration. Around Asia in 7 Dishes is a thoughtfully curated tasting experience celebrating the depth, elegance, and diversity of Asian cuisine. The evening will unfold through seven meticulously crafted small dishes, each inspired by a different Asian country. From subtle, delicate…
_description: Around Asia in 7 Dishes Thursday 28th May | Blossoms Cocktail Bar, Brighton Blossoms Cocktail Bar invites you to an intimate evening of refined culinary exploration. Around Asia in 7 Dishes is a thoughtfully curated tasting experience celebrating the depth, elegance, and diversity of Asian cuisine. The evening will unfold through seven meticulously crafted small dishes, each inspired by a different Asian country. From subtle, delicate flavours to rich and expressive compositions, every course has been designed to showcase balance, technique, and authenticity. This immersive dining experience will take your palate on a seamless journey across Asia, offering a celebration of culture, craftsmanship, and flavour in an elegant and relaxed setting. Spaces are limited. Early booking is recommended. Please note Vegetarians option is available but we are we are unable to cater for Vegans.

MANIFEST tackles toxic masculinity and the corporate capitalisation of young women through over-produced pop songs and…
_description: A drag musical comedy about your new favourite boyband trying to survive their second world tour. Join Ash Trey, Cody Pendant, Ruben Cox, and Ewan May as they attempt to tackle the threat of female empowerment and the maturation of their tweenage fanbase, while meeting the demands of the all-powerful ‘Management’. MANIFEST tackles toxic masculinity and the corporate capitalisation of young women through over-produced pop songs and strictly regimented choreography. Following their acclaimed debut at Brighton and Edinburgh Fringe with 60 Minutes of Mood Swings in 2023 and 2024 and their role on Chichester Festival Theatre’s Artist Development Programme in 2025, OnTheNose returns...

title: Scary Mary
summary: Daughter of Feminism, Mother of Sci-Fi, the original Goth girlfriend: Mary Shelley is spooky AF. Scary Mary is a darkly funny, gothic deep-dive about the bold, talented, and spooky AF Mary Shelley. The Monster Mash-Up of Siouxsie Sioux and a Tim Burton leading lady, Scary Mary is here to drag her secrets out of the crypt and onto the stage. Find out if she really lost her virginity on her mother’s grave, how her smash-hit Frankenstein…
_description: Daughter of Feminism, Mother of Sci-Fi, the original Goth girlfriend: Mary Shelley is spooky AF. Scary Mary is a darkly funny, gothic deep-dive about the bold, talented, and spooky AF Mary Shelley. The Monster Mash-Up of Siouxsie Sioux and a Tim Burton leading lady, Scary Mary is here to drag her secrets out of the crypt and onto the stage. Find out if she really lost her virginity on her mother’s grave, how her smash-hit Frankenstein galvanised from winning Lord Byron’s Lake Geneva Summer of 1816 ghost-story contest, and exactly what is inside that heart-shaped box in her writing desk... Part Post-Punk fever-dream, part confessional séance and the debut show from Friday’s Child Productions, Scary Mary crashes sizzling solo gig-theatre into historical profile to resurrect the literary icon whose life was every bit as strange, electric, and genre-defying as the monster she created.

title: Town Of Cats Binbag Wisdom Brassic Parp
summary: TOWN OF CATS Energetic nine piece festival favourites, Town of Cats bring their love of afrobeat, latin grooves, big dirty riffs, trashy 80’s pop, half remembered musicals and entirely hallucinated toilet poetry to the stage. Humorous, dark and introspective tales delivered with a blasting brass section and electrifying synth solos, Town of Cats deliver a whirlwind performance that’s infectiously fun, gets audiences to their feet and…
_description: TOWN OF CATS Energetic nine piece festival favourites, Town of Cats bring their love of afrobeat, latin grooves, big dirty riffs, trashy 80’s pop, half remembered musicals and entirely hallucinated toilet poetry to the stage. Humorous, dark and introspective tales delivered with a blasting brass section and electrifying synth solos, Town of Cats deliver a whirlwind performance that’s infectiously fun, gets audiences to their feet and keeps them dancing. BINBAG WISDOM Bristol's premium rap jokesters Binbag Wisdom return to Brighton with their brand new theatre-come-hip-hop extravaganza 'The Ballad of Wee Willy Winky' or 'How to Find Purpose in a rap desert'. Is it a live hip hop gig? A musical? I'm not sure. But it's funny, unique and needs to be experienced BRASSIC PARP DJ style pop medley mashups from only the best bits from 90s & 00s bangers. Performed by a seven piece horn section dressed up as Jurassic Park characters.

_description: BEAVERHAUSEN is back baby! For its second run of Brighton Fringe and he is SO excited. It was a success when debuted at KOMEDIA last year with multiple sell out shows (YAY) Beaverhausen is a silly sausage and queer gender-bending drag king who serves "an open hearted celebration of queer culture" with an extra dollop of big prat energy. He will leave you feeling camp, GAY and gorgeous. Join Beaverhausen as he takes you on a mission to save his hometown from something terrible.... Its drag, its burlesque and its bonkers!!!... So strap in, that's right ;) and enjoy a peek into Beaverhausens' world. Directed by "burlesque and musical comedy champion" - Selena Mersey. Veronica Von Beaverhausen is also a proud member of Clapback Club, award winning queer & feminist theatre makers and collective. AND co-producer of "BeaverTits", their sell-out cabaret show and fundraiser.

title: Andrew White What A Life
summary: An only-child with two siblings, Andrew White enjoyed a precocious childhood befriending retirees and penning self-indulgent poetry, until a literal circus clown warned him of imminent death on his 18th birthday. All the Jester foretold came to pass, and now Andrew must reflect on life without three close loved ones and do his best to honour their memories. Don’t miss this hilarious, honest and heart-warming new stand-up comedy show.…

Don’t miss this hilarious, honest and heart-warming new stand-up comedy show. Tour Support for Catherine Bohart, Kiri Pritchard-McLean and Jason Manford

title: Porgy And Bess At Boat
summary: A new jazz suite from Chris Coull, featuring award winning vocalist Imogen Ryall, playing the music of George Gershwin in an engaging and enthralling story that is both accessible and permeates the traditions of the post bop jazz movement. Embark on a story through time as we take you to 1930’s Charleston and a love story between down on his luck ‘Porgy’ and the sassy ‘Bess’. Featuring songs instantly recognisable (Ain’t Necessarily…
_description: A new jazz suite from Chris Coull, featuring award winning vocalist Imogen Ryall, playing the music of George Gershwin in an engaging and enthralling story that is both accessible and permeates the traditions of the post bop jazz movement. Embark on a story through time as we take you to 1930’s Charleston and a love story between down on his luck ‘Porgy’ and the sassy ‘Bess’. Featuring songs instantly recognisable (Ain’t Necessarily So, I Love You Porgy and of course Summertime) unhackneyed classics (I’ve Got Plenty Of Nothing, There’s A Boat Leaving Soon For New York) and rarely heard gems (Buzzard Song, Prayer, Strawberry Woman). In this project, Chris has brought together three of the finest rhythm section player London has to offer, one of the finest vocalists on the UK scene and his own skills to create a dynamic, swinging and above all thoughtfully hip jazz suite, that swings from hard bop grooves, sumptuous ballads, toe tapping Latin grooves and orchestrally inspired harmonies

title: Snails Ofthe Unexpected
summary: Chaos Theory is a sketch group consisting of four actor/writers – Mikylajane Durkan, Yasser Kayani, Maria Beadell and Bruce Williams, with director/writer Stephen Dinsdale. And there is music with Bunny Hopkins, legendary bluesman! Between them they have played a puddle in an advert, been the face of British Gas at the Olympics, worked with David Icke, worked with Dario Fo, stripped for Danish TV and written for BBC Films, BBC TV, ITV,…
_description: Chaos Theory is a sketch group consisting of four actor/writers – Mikylajane Durkan, Yasser Kayani, Maria Beadell and Bruce Williams, with director/writer Stephen Dinsdale. And there is music with Bunny Hopkins, legendary bluesman! Between them they have played a puddle in an advert, been the face of British Gas at the Olympics, worked with David Icke, worked with Dario Fo, stripped for Danish TV and written for BBC Films, BBC TV, ITV, BBC Radio 4 and the West End. Chaos Theory has been going for about six years and has played the Edinburgh Fringe, the Brighton Fringe several times, the Camden Fringe many times, Faversham Fringe and the Vault Festival. They write their own sketches and the show is always developing and they also support new writing from others. Sketches vary a lot, from light and frothy to dark and disturbing to running for your mum – but in a good way! From the icecream godfather to surgeons sexting to a wasp café. Pretty quickfire. Always funny!

venue_name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
summary: Think you have it bad? Not for long, and believe us, we've seen worse. _description: Think you have it bad? Not for long, and believe us, we've seen worse. Bring us your insurmountable secrets and we guarantee no problem or scenario too complicated, silly or gross for us to take on. We want to solve it for you and we must. Relationships, work, feuds with the local council? This is your moment to have award winning comedians take on your secrets and scenarios to make a fool proof plan which will have you leaving with a new lease of life. Or even ownership if leasing is no longer your thing. They say the best time to plant a tree is yesterday, the second best time is now. We don't know anything about that, but this is a show for humans... not trees.

title: Andrew Frost Pretending
summary: Following a sold-out Edinburgh Fringe run, Andrew Frost returns to the Brighton Fringe with a brand new show. Ever tried to figure out a magic trick? Don't. Andrew wants you to experience magic. He'll do whatever it takes to suspend your disbelief and stop you from analysing how the tricks work. He will use humour, surprises, and general deceitfulness to keep you distracted. If that doesn't work, he's not above embarrassing himself; he…
_description: Following a sold-out Edinburgh Fringe run, Andrew Frost returns to the Brighton Fringe with a brand new show. Ever tried to figure out a magic trick? Don't. Andrew wants you to experience magic. He'll do whatever it takes to suspend your disbelief and stop you from analysing how the tricks work. He will use humour, surprises, and general deceitfulness to keep you distracted. If that doesn't work, he's not above embarrassing himself; he is a magician after all.

title: Kane Abel Magicians Twin Feats
summary: 30 years after being pulled out of class to partake in twin studies, Kane & Abel take you inside the mystical, magical and hilarious world of life as a twin. Those conducting these studies were hoping for more than coincidences or feats but miracles or magic. Kane & Abel recreate the study in impossible circumstances for the ultimate Magicians Twin Feats. 'Real magic' (BBC Radio Bristol). Top Weekend Comedy Pick (Sunday Times).

title: Verity Sharpe Landlords Wet Dream
summary: “Charismatic and chaotic” comedian Verity Sharpe returns to Brighton Fringe with her debut show. Landlord’s Wet Dream is a bold and hilarious deep dive into the realities of renting—damp walls, exploitative landlords, and the looming threat of eviction— that offers a silver lining of laughter to the dark cloud that is temporary housing. Sharpe also squares up to the wider issue of profit-driven housing, wielding jaunty punk poetry,…
_description: “Charismatic and chaotic” comedian Verity Sharpe returns to Brighton Fringe with her debut show. Landlord’s Wet Dream is a bold and hilarious deep dive into the realities of renting—damp walls, exploitative landlords, and the looming threat of eviction— that offers a silver lining of laughter to the dark cloud that is temporary housing. Sharpe also squares up to the wider issue of profit-driven housing, wielding jaunty punk poetry, razor-sharp stand up, and anthemic original songs . Come for the comedy, stay for the biting capitalist critique. Or, come for the biting capitalist critique but be warned... you will laugh. Hard. “One of the most important show you’ll see all month”- Reviews Hub

title: Globe Rotter Work In Progress
summary: Roxane McLeod has spent over a decade as a yacht stewardess, travelling the world, and now she’s dropping anchor in Brighton for her first Work in Progress Show, GLOBE ROTTER. Expect sharp, slightly naughty laughs about family, failed self-improvement attempts, dating, and the chaos of life on the move. With absurd tales from life at sea, R-rated observations from her travels, and playful self-deprecation, Roxane delivers a fresh,…
_description: Roxane McLeod has spent over a decade as a yacht stewardess, travelling the world, and now she’s dropping anchor in Brighton for her first Work in Progress Show, GLOBE ROTTER. Expect sharp, slightly naughty laughs about family, failed self-improvement attempts, dating, and the chaos of life on the move. With absurd tales from life at sea, R-rated observations from her travels, and playful self-deprecation, Roxane delivers a fresh, fearless perspective. Opening the night is our Special guest, Shameel Kumar! Shameel is a New York native, Brighton-based comedian with a passion for the absurd. His material covers risqué topics such as the nutritional content of strawberries, the anatomy of mosquitoes, and the textural differences in facial hair. A brand-new show, catch it early!

Expect incriminations, interrogations and…
_description: Welcome all members of the Toddlingham neighbourhood watch to our AGM and gala fundraiser. Top of the agenda this year is.. MURDER. "The Watch" treasurer and all round good egg, Tony Rose lies dead, but whodunit and why? Let Leslie Bloom of “Toddle Watch Murder Division” guide you through the clues, suspects and red herrings as she attempts to solve this unexplained death in her own unique way. Expect incriminations, interrogations and possibly even something silly. Everyone is under suspicion, even you. Combining crafted comedy, pure silliness and whimsical improv, Leslie Bloom Solves a Murder is an hour of joyful laughter that celebrates the detective in us all. Leslie's alter-ego, performer Simon Topping, is an improviser and character comedian; founder of Extra Topping Comedy in 2022 and part of sketch duo Topping and Hards. “With his very funny antics he combines physical comedy, clowning and authenticity”. ★★★★★ (Reviews Hub)

She ready to help the callers on the line with their problems aided by special guests in her studio audience (you). An hour of stand-up, audience interaction and picking up a camp telephone. Star of award-winning fringe hits and sell-out Brighton fringe shows ‘Drag Queens vs Zombies’ and ‘Drag Queens vs Vampires’, come and help her, help you, help her become the light entertainment TV star she knows deep down she is. Stunning reviews of previous appearances below:

title: Wnkers
summary: W*NKERS: Spring Fling is a show dedicated to the Weird traditions of the Spring and the horniest time of the year; think pastoral scenes featuring fingers as udders for that critical STI check, the personification of Francophone Syphillis as a cabaret girl who’ll leave you tongue tied, and an ode to Bank Holidays. All against the background of looming fascism. It features co-creators Bel Parker and Jordana Belaiche as House White and…
_description: W*NKERS: Spring Fling is a show dedicated to the Weird traditions of the Spring and the horniest time of the year; think pastoral scenes featuring fingers as udders for that critical STI check, the personification of Francophone Syphillis as a cabaret girl who’ll leave you tongue tied, and an ode to Bank Holidays. All against the background of looming fascism. It features co-creators Bel Parker and Jordana Belaiche as House White and House Red. They aren’t exactly human and they aren’t entirely demonic either. They are raucous, queer and absurd – grotesque demon jesters that pierce the veils to many worlds, shapeshifting through characters, to feed on the mayhem they create. It’s definitely comedy.

title: Extraordinary
summary: What happens when you've been stuck behind a mask for so long that you don't even know what your real voice sounds like? Elaine has spent too long being seen and not heard - and sometimes barely that. We meet Elaine trapped in the hold of a toxic relationship, and losing herself in the noise of the world around her. Straight-laced and a sucker for rules, she yearns for something more. Find out what happens when she meets the…
_description: What happens when you've been stuck behind a mask for so long that you don't even know what your real voice sounds like? Elaine has spent too long being seen and not heard - and sometimes barely that. We meet Elaine trapped in the hold of a toxic relationship, and losing herself in the noise of the world around her. Straight-laced and a sucker for rules, she yearns for something more. Find out what happens when she meets the effervescent Clementine. Can she break familial cycles and ensure she finds her own voice? A new play written by Gemma Webber and co-directed by Gemma Webber and Robin Hodges. Content Warnings: Mentions of bereavement, and themes of coercive control and violence.

title: Vibrate
summary: This show takes the audience on a journey from early archeologists' discoveries, to Victorian toys and advertising, through to the modern toys of today - a show which explores how adult toys have been presented through history, and how attitudes have widely changed and shifted from a focus on female 'hysteria,' to an emphasis on wellbeing and self-care.' All presented through story and original songs.

title: Ashley Haden Genocidal Liberal 2 Electric Boogaloo Work In Progress

title: Soft Knocks At Gallery 19A
summary: Life rarely delivers its lessons in clean, dramatic blows. More often, they come quietly, insistently—through countless interruptions, small frictions, and the slow abrasion of repetition. Soft Knocks explores the subtle forces that shape both lives and landscapes, and the quiet strains that accumulate over time. Artists from Brighton, London and Bristol have come together to show their work at this hidden gem gallery in the heart of…

More often, they come quietly, insistently—through countless interruptions, small frictions, and the slow abrasion of repetition. Soft Knocks explores the subtle forces that shape both lives and landscapes, and the quiet strains that accumulate over time. Artists from Brighton, London and Bristol have come together to show their work at this hidden gem gallery in the heart of Hollingdean.

title: Sammy Stitches X M A S Boutique Hooked Worn
summary: SammyStitchesUK & M.A.S-Boutique present a vibrant springtime collaboration at Brighton Fringe, blending handmade crochet artistry with boutique fashion flair. Samantha of SammyStitchesUK showcases her hooked crochet animals — from cheeky frogs and curious cats to bright, blooming flowers - alongside colourful spring wear crafted in wool and magical gifts designed to delight. Each piece is lovingly made, celebrating the joy of yarn,…
_description: SammyStitchesUK & M.A.S-Boutique present a vibrant springtime collaboration at Brighton Fringe, blending handmade crochet artistry with boutique fashion flair. Samantha of SammyStitchesUK showcases her hooked crochet animals — from cheeky frogs and curious cats to bright, blooming flowers - alongside colourful spring wear crafted in wool and magical gifts designed to delight. Each piece is lovingly made, celebrating the joy of yarn, hooks, and imagination. Adding a stylish twist, M.A.S-Boutique unveils their brand-new fashion line, bringing elegance and contemporary design to the showcase. Together, this relaxed, family-friendly event invites audiences to explore one-of-a-kind gifts, playful companions, and fresh seasonal style under one roof. It is a joyful celebration of creativity, community, and craft, perfect for Brighton Fringe visitors seeking something original, heartfelt, and truly unique. Discover handmade treasures and boutique fashion in a welcoming space

title: Makeup Masterclass Workshop
summary: The Art of Facial Transformation: Feminising & Masculinising with Make-Up Make-up has the power to completely transform how we read a face. In this exciting and insightful masterclass at Brighton Fringe, we’ll explore the techniques behind feminising and masculinising facial features using contour, highlight, shading, brow design and structural illusion. Through live demonstration and clear, practical guidance, you’ll learn how subtle…
_description: The Art of Facial Transformation: Feminising & Masculinising with Make-Up Make-up has the power to completely transform how we read a face. In this exciting and insightful masterclass at Brighton Fringe, we’ll explore the techniques behind feminising and masculinising facial features using contour, highlight, shading, brow design and structural illusion. Through live demonstration and clear, practical guidance, you’ll learn how subtle placement and tonal shifts can soften, sharpen, sculpt or redefine facial structure. We’ll break down how make-up influences perception, expression and gender presentation. Whether for performance, drag, theatre, photography or personal exploration. This session is open to performers, creatives, make-up artists and anyone curious about the artistry of transformation. Expect expert tips, real-time transformation and plenty of “how did that just happen?” moments, plus a Q&A at the end where you can ask your questions and dive deeper into the craft.

title: A Head Full Of Bees
summary: What if you secretly think you might be demonic and doomed to hellfire? How do you reconcile that with creative ambition, a dedication to Motherhood and a wisp of hope that all is not lost? Hot mess hairdresser Lola has a secret; she's been faking it, all of it. Sanity, self-esteem, capable Mother and Salon owner. Truth is, she's been thumping against the walls of life, ALL her life and she's wondering, "What the f**k is wrong with me?…
_description: What if you secretly think you might be demonic and doomed to hellfire? How do you reconcile that with creative ambition, a dedication to Motherhood and a wisp of hope that all is not lost? Hot mess hairdresser Lola has a secret; she's been faking it, all of it. Sanity, self-esteem, capable Mother and Salon owner. Truth is, she's been thumping against the walls of life, ALL her life and she's wondering, "What the f**k is wrong with me? No one seems to know, except the formidable Mama Patsy; everything! But Lola is determined to figure it out. With the dubious "help" of her Shame Parrot and Media Maven Moda Monde' she faces her past to find an answer. But what is it THE answer? It's Sesame Street meets The Exorcist with original music and songs. A solo comedy with music about "learning to love your weird" .

title: Brighton Rocks Film Festival Programme Launch
summary: At this launch event, Brighton Rocks Film Festival Director and team will introduce the festival’s ethos, give highlights of the upcoming event (15-21 June) and invite discussion around what audiences want and need from a film festival today. Filmmakers featured in this year’s programme will also present sneak-preview clips and talk about their work. Brighton Rocks is proud to showcase some of the most diverse, original and boundary-…
_description: At this launch event, Brighton Rocks Film Festival Director and team will introduce the festival’s ethos, give highlights of the upcoming event (15-21 June) and invite discussion around what audiences want and need from a film festival today. Filmmakers featured in this year’s programme will also present sneak-preview clips and talk about their work. Brighton Rocks is proud to showcase some of the most diverse, original and boundary-pushing films being made today. Now in its 9th edition, the festival has become one of Brighton’s key platforms for independent cinema. This year’s programme includes amazing films made in Brighton alongside LGBTQIA+, student and experimental work, documentaries and dramas. The festival will also feature special strands focused on challenging transphobia and responding to troubling political trends, highlighting film as a space for resistance and debate. Afterwards everyone is invited to continue the conversation informally at The Actors Pub.

title: Monster
summary: 'Monster' is a 'hilarious' and joyful spoken word show by Naomi Wood (Gobbess) for anyone who has been afraid to dip their toe in or felt all at sea. A tentacled tale of myth and monstrosity about feeling exposed and learning to love both people and pond life. A ‘highly relatable’ show that will leave you feeling ‘seen’. This is a show about the transformative power of chucking yourself in the deep end.

_description: Drum and Blaze is a rising force in the music scene, bringing an electrifying mix of rhythm, energy, and inclusivity wherever they play. Recently making waves at major events like Brighton Pride and Lewes Bonfire, their performances are nothing short of spectacular. With a powerful drumming line-up, they know how to captivate an audience and ignite a crowd. Their contagious energy and vibrant spirit create an unforgettable atmosphere, leaving everyone craving more. Focusing on diversity and uniting people from all walks of life, Drum and Blaze proves that music has the power to bring us all together in one unbreakable rhythm. Get ready for a show that’ll get your heart racing!

Get to know this absurd and deeply flawed man as he gets to know himself. Goofy drag king show from award-winning British character comedian Kathy Maniura, BBC New Comedian shortlisted, 2023 and Sketch Off winner, 2020. “Simply genius” ★★★★★…

title: The Time Warp Extravaganza A Rocky Horror Drag Dance Spectacle
summary: THE TIME WARP EXTRAVAGANZA: A Rocky Horror Drag and Dance Spectacle ★★★★★ review. Step into the world of Rocky Horror at this unforgettable drag & dance show. Fierce, fabulous, and filthy in all the right ways! A full-throttle celebration of everything that makes Rocky Horror Picture Show a cult phenomenon. Audience participation highly encouraged. Get ready to sing along with your favourite songs, dress up in your wildest Rocky Horror…
_description: THE TIME WARP EXTRAVAGANZA: A Rocky Horror Drag and Dance Spectacle ★★★★★ review. Step into the world of Rocky Horror at this unforgettable drag & dance show. Fierce, fabulous, and filthy in all the right ways! A full-throttle celebration of everything that makes Rocky Horror Picture Show a cult phenomenon. Audience participation highly encouraged. Get ready to sing along with your favourite songs, dress up in your wildest Rocky Horror outfits, and immerse yourself in a night of pure fun and flamboyance. Whether you're a die-hard fan or new to the madness, this is one extravaganza you won’t want to miss! This isn't just a show—it is a cultural reset. Equal parts wild, wicked, and wonderful, it proves that Rocky Horror is still the bold, beating heart of queer theatre—and that drag, at its best, is an unstoppable force of expression and joy. It doesn't just reimagine the iconic story—it reinvents it for a new generation of misfits. this spectacle demands to be seen!

title: Where I End And You Begin
summary: Woyzeck loves Marie. Marie loves Woyzeck. Life is hard. Woyzeck kills Marie. Buchner’s original play Woyzeck, written in 1836, considers the impact of societal pressures on a poor soldier and his wife: Woyzeck feels powerless and humiliated. Marie must pay the price. It feels inevitable. Even now. Devised and developed by the company, Where I End and You Begin explores contemporary gender roles through the prism of Buchner’s classic…
_description: Woyzeck loves Marie. Marie loves Woyzeck. Life is hard. Woyzeck kills Marie. Buchner’s original play Woyzeck, written in 1836, considers the impact of societal pressures on a poor soldier and his wife: Woyzeck feels powerless and humiliated. Marie must pay the price. It feels inevitable. Even now. Devised and developed by the company, Where I End and You Begin explores contemporary gender roles through the prism of Buchner’s classic play. Through extracts, verbatim material, physical theatre, songs and new writing we question what it is to be afraid of each other - and how we might be brave.

title: El Viaje
venue_name: Fishing Museum Loft - The Old Net Loft
summary: Based on interviews with my grandmother, Abuela, El Viaje uses storytelling and song as devices to share her exciting, and heart-breaking, journey from Cuba to Puerto Rico, to North America. A journey that immerses audiences in the captivating history of my Cuban family, set against the backdrop of Cuba's political and cultural history, accompanied by original live music. Using prose, comedy, movement, and my guitar, I recount my…
_description: Based on interviews with my grandmother, Abuela, El Viaje uses storytelling and song as devices to share her exciting, and heart-breaking, journey from Cuba to Puerto Rico, to North America. A journey that immerses audiences in the captivating history of my Cuban family, set against the backdrop of Cuba's political and cultural history, accompanied by original live music. Using prose, comedy, movement, and my guitar, I recount my family’s extraordinary history. From my Bisabuelo (great-grandfather) fighting in the Cuban rebellion against Fulgencio Batista’s regime, to my Abuela’s incredible journey: escaping a dictatorship, winning a scholarship to study electrical engineering, and then becoming a prominent advocate for refugees throughout the Syrian crisis. This show vividly animates the challenges and triumphs of mine and my Abuela’s family. It is an honest and engaging account with themes of courage, empowerment, feminism, and justice echoing throughout.

title: Headmix Tragic Roundabout Live Music Extravaganza
summary: Come ready to bounce at this unforgettable night of unbridled brilliance! Two live bands that started in 90’s Brighton come together for the first time in so many years we can’t remember the last time. So let’s call it a one-off! Between them there's some banging new tracks plus some old favourites. Tragic Roundabout bring an eclectic melange of hardcore punked-up ska/klezmer blended with an unsubtle hint of the mystic eastern bloc.…
_description: Come ready to bounce at this unforgettable night of unbridled brilliance! Two live bands that started in 90’s Brighton come together for the first time in so many years we can’t remember the last time. So let’s call it a one-off! Between them there's some banging new tracks plus some old favourites. Tragic Roundabout bring an eclectic melange of hardcore punked-up ska/klezmer blended with an unsubtle hint of the mystic eastern bloc. Radical, irrepressible and humorous vibes are expected. Headmix are bolder and bouncier than ever, intoxicating audiences at many popular festivals over the last few years in the UK and Europe. Skilfully combining bagpipes, fiddle, accordion, whistle, melodica and heartfelt vocals with a driving rhythm section. Expect a totally unique, irresistibly dancey live experience. “Their eclectic mix of instruments and raw stage energy are amazing!“ (Last.fm) Get there early for special guest DJ Don Dapper spinning Afro, Balkan, Cumbia, Dub and Swing!

_description: Mat Smith (as heard on BBC, Komedia New Comedian semi-finalist) and Kieran Carr (2023 NZ Comedy Guild Awards, Leicester Square Theatre New Comedian 2025 semi-finalist) are back at Brighton Fringe with an hour of brand new standup. Kieran has performed in the UK and in New Zealand. He was a staple on the Auckland scene there, winning an award at the 2023 NZ Comedy Guild Awards. Since returning, he performs around the country at Glee Club Birmingham, West End Comedy Club, Backyard Comedy Club and last year's Edinburgh Fringe. Mat is an award-winning comedy writer who has been performing comedy since 2022. He has had material featured on BBC Radio 4 and BBC Scotland. Described as “precise, direct and unwavering”, he's performed at Hot Water, Komedia, The Bill Murray, Backyard and many more. He's also a bad bisexual with a black belt in judo but no driver's license.

His wife and her lover Betty give him a new name, Doctor Mew. Renamed, neutered and Doctor Mew has still not lost his love for podcast as he claws…
_description: Doctor Mew is an audience-interactive sci fi comedy about redemption, species regeneration and becoming feline. Clive a toxic sci-fi podcaster moaning about wokeness threatening his favourite sci fi program Dr Who is accidently is regenerated into a cat. His wife thinks it’s an improvement! His wife and her lover Betty give him a new name, Doctor Mew. Renamed, neutered and Doctor Mew has still not lost his love for podcast as he claws his ways to be the top cat in podcast world. Doctor Mew tells of his adventures as well as he shares his wisdom giving bad advice to famous characters the universe and talks about feline view of the world. Expect audience interaction, fabulous props and a few jokes about sci -fi. Audiences are welcome to cos play.

title: The Great 80S 90S Movie Soundtrack Songbook
summary: After three sell-out shows last year, The Great 80s & 90s Movie Soundtrack Songbook returns for its second year — bigger, louder, and packed with feel-good anthems. Created and performed by Paul Diello, this high-energy live show is a full-throttle celebration of the movie soundtracks that defined the era. Backed by an electrifying 8-piece band and powered by punchy three-part harmonies, the night is wall-to-wall hits from the big…
_description: After three sell-out shows last year, The Great 80s & 90s Movie Soundtrack Songbook returns for its second year — bigger, louder, and packed with feel-good anthems. Created and performed by Paul Diello, this high-energy live show is a full-throttle celebration of the movie soundtracks that defined the era. Backed by an electrifying 8-piece band and powered by punchy three-part harmonies, the night is wall-to-wall hits from the big screen. From Top Gun and Dirty Dancing to The Bodyguard and Pretty Woman, every song is designed to get the room singing along. Big choruses, iconic moments, and pure nostalgia — this is a party from the first note to the last.

title: Dr Jimmy Lyons Existential Physics Or Why The Universe Is Gay Work In Progress
summary: Dr. Jimmy has one aim: to discover the ultimate Theory of Everything (or become the first gay man to win a Nobel Prize in Physics). Why are waves gay? Particles straight? And quantum mechanics the ultimate textbook guide to being bisexual? Why are quarks queer? Tops difficult to observe? And bottoms ARE LITERALLY EVERYWHERE. Dr. Jimmy collides HARDCORE physics with queerness and existential dread as he scales the peak of all knowledge…
_description: Dr. Jimmy has one aim: to discover the ultimate Theory of Everything (or become the first gay man to win a Nobel Prize in Physics). Why are waves gay? Particles straight? And quantum mechanics the ultimate textbook guide to being bisexual? Why are quarks queer? Tops difficult to observe? And bottoms ARE LITERALLY EVERYWHERE. Dr. Jimmy collides HARDCORE physics with queerness and existential dread as he scales the peak of all knowledge in this world-famous lecture. Along the way, he'll demonstrate his ground-breaking inventions, such as the ‘Pansychinator,’ which lets him communicate with all forms of matter, and his pièce de résistance: the Parallel-o-scope. This device scans the multiverse and connects him with alternate versions of himself - like Dr. Jimmie (spelt ‘ie’), or inevitably, a more successful and fulfilled Dr. Jimmy. So, join Dr. Jimmy at the frontier of human knowledge and stand naked (literally) before the universe. 16+ welcome at 3pm on Sat. 9th May

title: The Comedy Centre Showcase

Step back to an imagined cabaret haunt in 1930s Paris or Berlin and join Cyril the emcee with Gaylord, Babette, Goldie, Bert and the indomitable Zelda as they perform ballads, torch songs, comedy…
_description: Set to take cabaret to new heights with a special performance on Brighton's i360! C’est Magnifique, winners of the 2025 Fringe Outgoing Touring Award and brought to you by Chocolate Box Theatre, is escapist heaven for any musical theatre fan. Step back to an imagined cabaret haunt in 1930s Paris or Berlin and join Cyril the emcee with Gaylord, Babette, Goldie, Bert and the indomitable Zelda as they perform ballads, torch songs, comedy numbers, musical theatre favourites and a pop of pop. C’est Magnifique appears in the Wunderbarn for four fabulous nights, plus a very special C’est Magnifique in the Sky aboard the iconic Brighton i360. Performed high above the seafront, it promises sparkle, sophistication and sky-high entertainment. Selling out to packed audiences with rave reviews, they don’t just can-can , they will, will; accompanied by live music and (very) high kicks!

title: Resonant Void
company: The Authentic Artist Collective with Joanna Rosenfeld
summary: Directly from Tokyo (Japan): Resonant Void is an experimental solo Butoh performance that moves through shifting states of presence, rupture, and quiet emergence. Using a mosquito net, plastic sheeting, two black skirts, and a portable lighting and projection system, the work creates a delicate terrain where the body meets materials that conceal, resist, and transform. The mosquito net forms a fragile chamber that holds breath and…
_description: Directly from Tokyo (Japan): Resonant Void is an experimental solo Butoh performance that moves through shifting states of presence, rupture, and quiet emergence. Using a mosquito net, plastic sheeting, two black skirts, and a portable lighting and projection system, the work creates a delicate terrain where the body meets materials that conceal, resist, and transform. The mosquito net forms a fragile chamber that holds breath and memory; the plastic sheets become boundaries that distort, shimmer, and eventually break; and the black skirts shift between creature, mask, shadow, and weight. Light and projection carve unstable edges, allowing the performer to drift between visibility and disappearance. Sound, gesture, and texture unfold in slow waves, inviting the audience into a contemplative space where identity loosens and meaning forms in the intervals between movements.

title: Where Are We Going With This
summary: Where Are We Going With This? depicts two University students meeting on a bench at 2am after a bad night out. This touching two-hander follows the two students' struggles to open up to one another, exploring the awkward comedy and profound intimacy that can occur in those one-off conversations with a stranger. They flirt, fight, and fumble along a tightrope walk of social norms and personal boundaries, discussing their outlook on the…
_description: Where Are We Going With This? depicts two University students meeting on a bench at 2am after a bad night out. This touching two-hander follows the two students' struggles to open up to one another, exploring the awkward comedy and profound intimacy that can occur in those one-off conversations with a stranger. They flirt, fight, and fumble along a tightrope walk of social norms and personal boundaries, discussing their outlook on the future, their bouts with loneliness, and, eventually, why they ended up on a bench in the middle of the night. He is a quick-witted and jovial pessimist. She is a distrusting, cynical optimist. Together, they bring out the ugliest and most tender parts of one another as they learn that often, the hardest part of opening up to a stranger is enduring the silence that follows.

_description: Stand up comedian Fitzgerald Honger has a few jokes to run by you... Now whether you're approaching, currently in your thirties or would like to reminisce about they way things were, this show is for you. And if you're really young and want a glimpse of what your future could entail if you don't eat all your veggies, this is also for you. Of course all manner of other topics will be discussed and they'll be so relatable. Like super relatable - almost like I have gained access to your private emails through an elaborate phishing scam. You'll be surprised by how many people's password is still ABC123! In today's world, it feels like there are so many things that we don't really understand. I just want to ask the question 'Can we talk about this?'

_description: Get ready for the ultimate daytime party where grown-ups and kids dance together to the best dance music ever made! Tiny Dancers Family Rave is the award-winning event that has been selling out legendary London venues for over five years. We are thrilled to bring our high-energy and infectious spirit to Caravanserai for Brighton Fringe. Join our resident DJ JOY ALARM for a journey through nostalgic hits that travel through all eras of dance music. Having graced the stage at many major UK festivals including Glastonbury, Boomtown and Isle of Wight, JOY ALARM breathes new life into the tunes you raved to back when sleepless nights meant "bottled beer" rather than "bottle feed". Expect a sensory wonderland for all ages: • Live DJs and MCing • Bubbles, Confetti Cannons, and Balloons • Creative Crafts and Face Painting • Huge audience participation moments Relive your clubbing days and introduce the next generation to the culture we love. It’s big tunes for parents and big fun for kids!

title: Histerical History Improvised
venue_name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)
summary: Winston Churchill enjoying yoga and matcha lattes; French revolutionaries working for Big Tech; Queen Victoria eating tripe out of a trough - impossible scenes, you might think - but not when History is Improvised! Histerical is an improvised jaunt through the history that you didn’t learn at school - because it never happened! Anything is possible in this 60-minute show in which we transport you to any historical era your little minds…
_description: Winston Churchill enjoying yoga and matcha lattes; French revolutionaries working for Big Tech; Queen Victoria eating tripe out of a trough - impossible scenes, you might think - but not when History is Improvised! Histerical is an improvised jaunt through the history that you didn’t learn at school - because it never happened! Anything is possible in this 60-minute show in which we transport you to any historical era your little minds can think of - Regency? Ancient Egypt? Renaissance Italy? That bit between people wearing long wigs and when they started wearing tricorne hats? Literally anything - within the bounds of taste - is up for grabs! Want to learn about the past? This is the WRONG show for you - we remix the past! And we’re not going to just show you the big figures from history - there’s space for the little people from history too! So, what are you waiting for? Join us on our historically hysterical journey into lies and laughter.

_description: Winners of the 2025 Keeping it Fringe Edinburgh Award. Bex Wall is bringing her 'Powerhouse' show to Brighton Sex? Yes please. Raves? Absolutely MDMA? Just a dabble. Relive the power of 90s raves Featuring iconic tracks by dance legends Orbital, this play takes the audience on a hilarious deep-dive into Bex’s world.... Bex is a woman in her 40's struggling with life's expectations in a twist of fate she rejects safe and abandons herself to life. Consequences be damned she embraces a reality that’s messing exhilarating, cruel and wild. Be prepared to be moved by the beat, embrace pumping bodies and welcome that baseline in with this highly personal yet universal play. This story comes from somewhere real, says Bex Wall. It’s about the weird, unspoken places grief takes us—and how music, madness and human connection can carry us through. Bex’s stories are unhinged, unfiltered and bloody hilarious. - says Phil Hartnoll, Orbital

_description: Yes! The Brighton Beach Boys return with the Psychedelic Orchestra to perform Pet Sounds vs Sgt Pepper's Lonely Heart Club Band. Bring the show back to it's original home, this will be the first time the band have performed these two classic pillars of popular music in a decade. Featuring all of the usual fun, with a forensic ear for recreating the original sounds of each album, accompanied by strings and brass, making the music come alive. Please come and enjoy the genius of Brian Wilson, the melodic genius of Paul McCartney, the wit of John Lennon, the experimentalism of George Harrison, recreated by Steve Wrigley, Glen Richardson, Theseus Gerrard, Adrian Marshall, Jono Harrison, Tom Arnold, Charlotte Glasson with Special Guests.

_description: Starting where Banjo Groyne meets Madeira Drive next to The Volk's railway shed, everyone will experience The Pioneer train (The Daddy Long Legs) using their phones with an innovative smartphone app created by artist Luciana Haill. The historical facts and cultural connections are presented in a talk that becomes a guided walk for 1.3 miles as we follow part of the route this train made between 1896 and 1901. At the end, we will all have an interior tour inside the opulent carriage and upper deck of The Daddy Long Legs, stopping for souvenir photos. This is fully accessible using pavements and paths at beach level and ending close to the car wash near ASDA in Brighton Marina. Please download the app in advance, as signal can be patchy on the beach! The app is called Pioneer_AR and can be found here: https://sites.google.com/view/daddy-long-legs-train

_description: Three is one. One is Three. Come and See! From the Adelaide Fringe 2025 award winning artist, King of More, comes a brand-new show about the wonder, symbolism and mystery of the number 3. Number 3 has ancient, magical and mundane meanings and these various aspects are brought into this unique show. Everything in threes is welcome - from threesomes to Holy Trinity. Three wise men meet three Fates. The maid, the mother and the crone all knocking on one door. This joyful, intriguing, and adamantly not-educational show will sprint through our body, mind and soul facets to unite and question. With a mystery visit from the Hag Kuaka testing your hope. All in service of embracing the uncertainty and the unknown. Come and let us not know together. King of More is queer immersive performer and an esoteric jester, originally from Bosnia and Herzegovina. Using humour, music, and interactive storytelling, he creates unique, thought-provoking experiences inspiring people to live 5% more present.

The show takes place in her first-ever therapy session, as she attempts to piece herself back together after that Costa incident. She realises recovery will take more…
_description: Woman (33) is a one-woman clown/character comedy show starring Woman (33), who has a bag of tote bags, a uterus in retrograde and an inkling that her life is one size too small. From crying in front of Costa to looking for solace in IKEA, this is the story of finding joy. The show takes place in her first-ever therapy session, as she attempts to piece herself back together after that Costa incident. She realises recovery will take more than a bubble bath or a trip to IKEA, and begins confronting the parts of herself she’d rather ignore: the environmentally (self)conscious consumer, the concerningly mature inner child, and the hustle loving "IT GIRL" persona she hides behind. The woman behind the Woman is Lilla Multipass (★★★★★, Morning Star) – a London-based Hungarian clown with a knack for psychology – blending two of her passions in her debut solo show. Come, get on this joke-packed emotional rollercoaster and let your inner child out to play: it’s cheaper than therapy!

From Richard Madeley’s Millenium Cupboard to the new series of Pro-Celebrity Dogging, the 21st Century has been an absolute delight. It’s been an amazing time too for veteran Essex Comedian Paul Merryck, so join him as he takes you on a journey through time, joyously and tenuously intertwining seismic…
_description: Lager Jus – 25 Glorious Years of the 21st Century For all of you who think the old 2000s so far has been a bit shit – think again! From Richard Madeley’s Millenium Cupboard to the new series of Pro-Celebrity Dogging, the 21st Century has been an absolute delight. It’s been an amazing time too for veteran Essex Comedian Paul Merryck, so join him as he takes you on a journey through time, joyously and tenuously intertwining seismic global changes with the continuous unravelling of his ridiculous life. WARNING: Unlike many fringe shows, there’s no profound message or meaning that will gradually reveal itself as the show progresses, teaching you something about the performer, the world and, perhaps, yourself. On the contrary, you’ll learn absolutely nothing and may leave the show a little bit thicker than when you came in. There are lots and lots of jokes though. “gag-focussed delivery... . high laugh rate... . you’d think that the spirit of Mike Reid is alive and well” Chortle

_description: Miles Betterthanieu is one of the world's leading True Crime Podcasters (TM). You'll know him as presenter of '15th In Line: An Investigation into why Prince Edward is actually the Queen’s Worst Child' (Natter Platter Nominee 2022*), 'Windsor vs Castle: Who Is The Best Barbara?' and 'Murder of the True Crime Podcaster'. But for his new series 'The Famous Ashtray', an investigation into the object at the dark heart of every musical controversy of the 20th/21st Centuries, has Miles finally met his match? In a terrifying live show that ties together everything from witch cults to BuzzBalls, from getting punched in the face to 80s EuroPop, this is True Crime Podcasting (TM) you'll want to like and subscribe to. 'The Famous Ashtray' is a psychedelic character comedy from the unruly mind of Jacob Lovick (4 million views on TikTok/Instagram). *'Most Episodes in One Series' award Praise for Jacob's previous work: "Why wouldn't you go?" ★★★★ - A Youngish Perspective ★★★★ - Broadway Baby

_description: Organised: Crime is a bold new dark comedy making its way to Brighton Fringe 2026, after a sell-out debut run at Camden Fringe 2025. This sharp, female-led production from emerging theatre-group Gut Rot Girls (Eve Callow-Salt, Jane Herbert, and Martha Powell-Dooley) blends biting humour with bloodstained storage hacks - think Marie Kondo meets The Sopranos. Meet Agatha’s Angels, a premium home organisation service with a zero-judgement policy - and zero witnesses. Behind the label maker lies a thriving criminal operation, and when a routine clean-up spirals out of control, three women must mop their way out of a deadly mess. With fast-paced dialogue, twisted plot turns, and themes tackling workplace danger and loyalty, Organised: Crime promises dark laughs and darker secrets, all hidden behind immaculate cupboard doors. Expect mess. Expect mayhem. Expect women who know exactly where to dispose the bodies.

title: Percy Nyx Prince Of Dreams
summary: Enter a surreal world of dreams, where glittering drag prince Percy Nyx guides us through the subconscious of Alex, a dreamer caught between childhood stories and adult truths. Blending twisted fairy tales,poetic storytelling, live vocals and drag finery, this genre-bending theatrical cabaret explores identity, gender, and trauma with moving moments of laughter and reflection. Percy Nyx: Prince of Dreams dives headfirst into the magic…
_description: Enter a surreal world of dreams, where glittering drag prince Percy Nyx guides us through the subconscious of Alex, a dreamer caught between childhood stories and adult truths. Blending twisted fairy tales,poetic storytelling, live vocals and drag finery, this genre-bending theatrical cabaret explores identity, gender, and trauma with moving moments of laughter and reflection. Percy Nyx: Prince of Dreams dives headfirst into the magic and meaning of what lies beneath sleep. From Lex Pickett—multi-award-winning performer comes a dazzling journey through dreams, memory, and self-discovery. So sit back, relax, and dream a while with me... (Outstanding Theatre Fringe Award 2025), SohoPlayhouse NY Encore Series finalist, and founding member of multi-award winning cabaret collective ClapBackClub

title: Crazy Rabbit Ladies
summary: Rachel Quinn (Finalist Komedia New Comedy Award and Finalist Hastings New Comedy of the Year) and Charlotte Madden (Chichester New Act Finalist and Semi-Finalist Komedia New Comedy Award) split an hour of work-in-progress stand-up comedy. Following sold-out runs at Brighton Fringe 2025, comedy buddies Rachel and Charlotte are back with new material and fresh takes on bumbling through life with a shared interest in rabbits. Charlotte…
_description: Rachel Quinn (Finalist Komedia New Comedy Award and Finalist Hastings New Comedy of the Year) and Charlotte Madden (Chichester New Act Finalist and Semi-Finalist Komedia New Comedy Award) split an hour of work-in-progress stand-up comedy. Following sold-out runs at Brighton Fringe 2025, comedy buddies Rachel and Charlotte are back with new material and fresh takes on bumbling through life with a shared interest in rabbits. Charlotte serves wonky takes on living childfree as a former rebel. Comedic riffs on life’s everyday strifes and some wild family dramas. Rachel knows the version of herself the world sees doesn’t quite match who she really is. Expect jokes, warmth, and a bit of self-discovery as she figures it out with you. May or may not contain rabbit related material.

title: Animated Poetry
company: Brighton International Animation Festival/ POW! Play On Words
summary: Brighton International Animation Festival is teaming up with Poetry platform POW! Play On Words for a collaborative exploration of the engagement between animation and performance poetry. Come for a dynamic evening of animated poetry shorts and live performances responding to the films. The evening will explore the intersection between the two mediums whilst initiating a poetic artistic dialogue.

Play On Words for a collaborative exploration of the engagement between animation and performance poetry. Come for a dynamic evening of animated poetry shorts and live performances responding to the films. The evening will explore the intersection between the two mediums whilst initiating a poetic artistic dialogue.

title: Church Of Italo Presents Eat The Rich
summary: Legendary Brighton club night collective The Church of Italo know fashion. They know music, clubbing, drag and cabaret. And they know that there is only one serious solution to the problems facing society today – to Eat the Rich! Come down to Klub Kaput at Caravanserai and party like its 1789. Expect guillotine glamour, revolting revolutionaries and horrifying haute couture mixed up in a blender with punk, electro, disco and house and…
_description: Legendary Brighton club night collective The Church of Italo know fashion. They know music, clubbing, drag and cabaret. And they know that there is only one serious solution to the problems facing society today – to Eat the Rich! Come down to Klub Kaput at Caravanserai and party like its 1789. Expect guillotine glamour, revolting revolutionaries and horrifying haute couture mixed up in a blender with punk, electro, disco and house and served to you on a silver platter. Featuring a cannibal cabaret starring some of Brighton’s best alternative drag talent, interactive set design from the iconique OddFabrications, music from DJ Dr Rat and friends, and presided over by the spectre of the revolution themselves, our very own Madame Guillotine, Mx Mother Misha! And of course it wouldn’t be the Church of Italo without a chance to involve you! The audience! Prizes will be awarded for the most revolutionary, most cannibalistic, and most aristocratic costumes of the evening. Let them eat c***!!

title: Princess Sparkles
summary: Step into the not-so-glittery world of Princess Sparkles: a professional princess-for-hire who’s very available, a teeny bit unstable, and just that little bit too much. Appearing at five-year-old birthday parties somewhere near you, she’s flustered, running late, and it looks like more than just her costume is coming apart at the seams. Want to feel like a child again? Ever worked with children? Ever wondered why people warn against…
_description: Step into the not-so-glittery world of Princess Sparkles: a professional princess-for-hire who’s very available, a teeny bit unstable, and just that little bit too much. Appearing at five-year-old birthday parties somewhere near you, she’s flustered, running late, and it looks like more than just her costume is coming apart at the seams. Want to feel like a child again? Ever worked with children? Ever wondered why people warn against it? Prepare to be hurled into a chaotically fun-filled birthday extravaganza complete with games, “magic,” and stories gone wildly off-script. But beware: she is definitely not Elsa, and this party might not be suitable for children... or adults... or anyone, really. As her crown slips, so does her grip on reality. Lily Maryon’s debut show is an unhinged hour of character comedy with a theatrical twist, casting the audience in the role of the children as Sparkles fights to keep the party and herself together. Sketch Off Quarter Finalist 2026

title: You Are All Resources Work In Progress
summary: Ever wondered whose side HR is really on? Join HR consultant, Alllison Pope, as she leads Remark Insurance through a workforce restructure. This satirical comedy puts HR under the microscope. Expect questionable professional advice, power dressing and corporate duplicity with 90s references abound. If you remember Kilroy, work in HR or have had a contretemps with HR, this show is for you. Runner-up West End Women's New Comedian of the…
_description: Ever wondered whose side HR is really on? Join HR consultant, Alllison Pope, as she leads Remark Insurance through a workforce restructure. This satirical comedy puts HR under the microscope. Expect questionable professional advice, power dressing and corporate duplicity with 90s references abound. If you remember Kilroy, work in HR or have had a contretemps with HR, this show is for you. Runner-up West End Women's New Comedian of the Year 2025 and Sketch Off! semi-finalist 2025.

The big lovable rogue has a good heart and means well. He’s doing his best to grow and become more progressive, but cor blimey! He ain’t half got a long way to go! “Power-…

But the reality is the 6’4”, 18 stone, scary, intimidating, inappropriate, doolally, ex con, is blind to his flaws and thinks his crazy behaviour is normal... And that’s where the comedy lies. The big lovable rogue has a good heart and means well. He’s doing his best to grow and become more progressive, but cor blimey! He ain’t half got a long way to go! “Power-packed performance jammed full of gags – a real blast.” - Chortle. “Deft Joke Writer” -Loaded Magazine. “Laughed my t*ts off!” - Irvine Welsh. As seen on BBC1, ITV, C4, Dave & Apple TV. As heard on Radio 4.

title: South London Jazz Orchestra
summary: The South London Jazz Orchestra returns to Brighton to dazzle you with big band favourites from the whole history of jazz - as well as some more surprising choices - in an evening of funk, Latin, and of course, classic swing. Dancing in the aisles will be positively encouraged, or just sit back and enjoy timeless tunes from the likes of Glenn Miller, Duke Ellington, Count Basie and many more.

Dancing in the aisles will be positively encouraged, or just sit back and enjoy timeless tunes from the likes of Glenn Miller, Duke Ellington, Count Basie and many more.

title: Nathan Cassidy Weeee
summary: Multi-award winning standup comic tells the story of how this year's Ashes series changed his life. A story of love, loss and Travis Head’s moustache. Last Christmas Day, Nathan Cassidy is alone in a basement, feverish and half-drunk, watching England getting destroyed in the Ashes. But as the Ashes slips further out of reach, something strange begins to happen... a surreal journey of survival, redemption and hope. From the award-…
_description: Multi-award winning standup comic tells the story of how this year's Ashes series changed his life. A story of love, loss and Travis Head’s moustache. Last Christmas Day, Nathan Cassidy is alone in a basement, feverish and half-drunk, watching England getting destroyed in the Ashes. But as the Ashes slips further out of reach, something strange begins to happen... a surreal journey of survival, redemption and hope. From the award-winning star of 25 solo shows and one of comedy’s most original voices, this show is a hilarious and heart-opening journey through cricket, collapse, and the strange magic of Christmas. And, like all the best stories, like the ones his grandad used to tell him as a kid, this one might only be half true too. 13 Best Show wins/nominations in UK Comedy Festivals since 2019. Star of 3 Amazon Prime specials, BBC Radio 5 Live, and million downloaded podcast Daily Notes. Catch his other show Ewwww! at the Fringe too.

title: Simulation Theory
summary: Simulation Theory is a Brighton-born improvised comedy group performing fast, funny and completely unpredictable shows to sell-out audiences across the city. Fresh from packed-out nights in Westdene and featured in The Argus and Sussex Express, they return for a Brighton Fringe special. Every scene is made up on the spot and inspired by your suggestions - from ridiculous characters to unexpected storylines, anything can happen. No two…
_description: Simulation Theory is a Brighton-born improvised comedy group performing fast, funny and completely unpredictable shows to sell-out audiences across the city. Fresh from packed-out nights in Westdene and featured in The Argus and Sussex Express, they return for a Brighton Fringe special. Every scene is made up on the spot and inspired by your suggestions - from ridiculous characters to unexpected storylines, anything can happen. No two shows are ever the same. Expect a relaxed, friendly, laid-back atmosphere and big laughs, created by performers trained with the world-renowned AndAlso Improv company. Grab your friends, BYOB and head down to The Barn for a superb night of Brighton-born comedy. “Hilarious, friendly, laid back and local” “Sharp-witted... great laughs all evening” “So many great characters and plot twists — laughed a lot”

title: Goss
summary: Award-winning dancer and comedian Sam Burkett is here for the freshest gossip—and they want it LIVE. Watch them spin your stories into a hilarious blend of improv comedy and experimental dance. Expect the unexpected, and come ready to spill. GOSS is an improvised dance-comedy solo show where Sam gossips with the audience live. Each performance is entirely unique, shaped by spontaneous conversations, physicality, and the atmosphere in…
_description: Award-winning dancer and comedian Sam Burkett is here for the freshest gossip—and they want it LIVE. Watch them spin your stories into a hilarious blend of improv comedy and experimental dance. Expect the unexpected, and come ready to spill. GOSS is an improvised dance-comedy solo show where Sam gossips with the audience live. Each performance is entirely unique, shaped by spontaneous conversations, physicality, and the atmosphere in the room. Think crowd work special meets performance art; it’s about creating a space of genuine listening and connection that is also incredibly stupid. Presented by Just Something Different.

title: Music Box The Improvised Comedy Musical
summary: Step into a world where nothing is planned and everything is possible. Music Box takes your suggestions and turns them into a brand new, completely improvised comedy musical - songs, plot twists, dodgy choreography and all! No two shows are ever the same but whatever happens, it’s made up on the spot, powered by your ideas and our questionable decision-making. Come help us create the next hit...or at least something delightfully…

Music Box takes your suggestions and turns them into a brand new, completely improvised comedy musical - songs, plot twists, dodgy choreography and all! No two shows are ever the same but whatever happens, it’s made up on the spot, powered by your ideas and our questionable decision-making. Come help us create the next hit...or at least something delightfully unhinged. ★★★★★ “This one’s brilliant” (Fringe Guru) ★★★★★ “Lively, sharp, superior improvised fun!” (Remote Goat)

title: Ngj Fresh Sounds Showcase 2026
summary: New Generation Jazz present our Fresh Sounds emergence showcase featuring JEMIMA WHYTE and OLI HOWE - two of the most exciting up and coming artists currently working in the space where jazz meets urban beats - both performing with their full live bands - with DJs warming up beforehand.. It’ll be a party like no other! Jemima Whyte is a saxophonist, vocalist and composer bringing an electrifying blend of northern dance culture, jazz,…
_description: New Generation Jazz present our Fresh Sounds emergence showcase featuring JEMIMA WHYTE and OLI HOWE - two of the most exciting up and coming artists currently working in the space where jazz meets urban beats - both performing with their full live bands - with DJs warming up beforehand.. It’ll be a party like no other! Jemima Whyte is a saxophonist, vocalist and composer bringing an electrifying blend of northern dance culture, jazz, afrobeat, soul and retro warmth with her horn-heavy band laying down some irresistible grooves. She's been making a big impression with appearances at Love Supreme Festival and Jazz Re:freshed. Oli Howe is a pianist, composer, and producer. His unique take on slick and funky fusion has gained him millions of streams across three sensational albums, he's performed all around the world with sell-out shows at Ronnie Scott's and Jazz Cafe, sharing the stage with legends such as Billy Cobham, and his signature reharm videos are an insta sensation.

title: Vaxinated 2 A Musical Booster
summary: Step into a world where glamour meets showtunes! Rubella Vaxine takes centre stage in a high-camp, high-octane drag extravaganza featuring iconic numbers from the great musicals. From belt-your-heart-out ballads to razzle-dazzle showstoppers, she spins Broadway classics into something delightfully queer, wickedly funny, and unmistakably Rubella. Expect bold looks, big vocals, and even bigger personality as she brings your favourite…
_description: Step into a world where glamour meets showtunes! Rubella Vaxine takes centre stage in a high-camp, high-octane drag extravaganza featuring iconic numbers from the great musicals. From belt-your-heart-out ballads to razzle-dazzle showstoppers, she spins Broadway classics into something delightfully queer, wickedly funny, and unmistakably Rubella. Expect bold looks, big vocals, and even bigger personality as she brings your favourite musical moments to life with a twist. Whether you’re a theatre kid at heart or just here for the glitter, this show promises laughs, gasps, and a standing ovation you’ll feel in your soul. Accompanied by the phenomenal talent of Izzy Owen on keys and maybe some surprise guests will also be popping in too. You will not want to miss this one-night only event at the Brighton Fringe! Lights up. Wig secured. Let the overture begin.

title: Clownunity Teeth And Tenderness
summary: ClownUnity - Teeth and Tenderness is a heart‑opening clown performance that celebrates human connection in a post‑truth world. It’s a show that combines bite and softness, truth and absurdity, vulnerability and joy. This performance is made possible by the Brighton Fringe Community Award 2024, awarded for #LewesCurious events and continues the pay‑it‑forward chain of community creativity — one offering making space for the next - each…
_description: ClownUnity - Teeth and Tenderness is a heart‑opening clown performance that celebrates human connection in a post‑truth world. It’s a show that combines bite and softness, truth and absurdity, vulnerability and joy. This performance is made possible by the Brighton Fringe Community Award 2024, awarded for #LewesCurious events and continues the pay‑it‑forward chain of community creativity — one offering making space for the next - each step opening the door for more joy, play, and collective imagination. This is not a polished product. This is a communal ritual of presence, play, and connection, remembering we all belong.

title: Nathan Cassidy Ewwww
summary: Winner Best Show Brighton Fringe 2022/2023 with an extraordinary new standup show. WARNING: FULL-FRONTAL NUDITY - Ewwww! After a single throwaway comment from a 20-year-old, Nathan Cassidy begins to unravel — is he old now? Does he care? In this daring and hilarious new hour, Cassidy responds the only way he knows how: by taking the biggest risks of his professional life. With time running out, what will he do to chase the high? Maybe…

In this daring and hilarious new hour, Cassidy responds the only way he knows how: by taking the biggest risks of his professional life. With time running out, what will he do to chase the high? Maybe nudity. Maybe a mic drop you’ll never forget. Expect powerful storytelling, brutal honesty and an image that might live with you forever. Another not-to-be-missed show from the multi award-winning, critically acclaimed star. This one’s unforgettable. Star of 6 Specials (inc 3 Amazon Prime), BBC Radio 5 Live and million downloaded podcast 'Daily Notes'. European Tour 2025. 13 Comedy Award wins/nominations 2019-2025. And catch his other show From the Ashes at the Fringe too!

_description: The 80s Party Game show from the award-winning world touring Dizzy O’Dare (Winner of the International Festival of Fools & Bussan International Comedy Festival) Get ready to unleash your party animal, throw on your 80s fancy dress, and become part of the most outrageous interactive 80s UK TV game show that never happened. With a killer soundtrack of 80s hits, a glittering host who’s equal parts charming and chaotic, and a line-up of hilariously stupid games like 'Poop the potato', this is your chance to dance, laugh, and compete like never before.

title: A Gathering Of Witches An Evening Of Music Poetry
summary: Welcome to A Gathering of Witches—Brighton’s most magical poetry and music night! We celebrate the creative talent of local artists, and inspire people to connect to their personal power, nature, and spirituality within a supportive community. Join us for a special edition of our show at the Brighton Fringe, where we will be inviting local witches to the stage for an exclusive set of words and music. Prepare for an enchanting evening…
_description: Welcome to A Gathering of Witches—Brighton’s most magical poetry and music night! We celebrate the creative talent of local artists, and inspire people to connect to their personal power, nature, and spirituality within a supportive community. Join us for a special edition of our show at the Brighton Fringe, where we will be inviting local witches to the stage for an exclusive set of words and music. Prepare for an enchanting evening of spellbinding performances—and of course, a spell or two! Featuring performances from Delphine - ocean witch songstress, The Coven Choir - Brighton’s witchiest community choir, and sprigs of heather - poet, witch, and musician. Doors at 7pm for a 7.15pm start. The show will last around one hour. Make sure you follow @agatheringofwitches on Instagram for all event updates!

title: A Kate Bush Cornucopia
summary: Back for a third year after consecutive sell-outs, A Kate Bush Cornucopia returns. Created and performed by Paul Diello, this high-energy tribute celebrates the music of Kate Bush with flair, heart, and serious musical punch. Featuring bold three-part harmonies, the show reimagines Kate Bush classics in fresh and unexpected ways. This year brings something extra, with a special guest appearance from The Marella Quartet, adding sweeping…
_description: Back for a third year after consecutive sell-outs, A Kate Bush Cornucopia returns. Created and performed by Paul Diello, this high-energy tribute celebrates the music of Kate Bush with flair, heart, and serious musical punch. Featuring bold three-part harmonies, the show reimagines Kate Bush classics in fresh and unexpected ways. This year brings something extra, with a special guest appearance from The Marella Quartet, adding sweeping string arrangements and a new sense of drama to the performance. An interactive Kate Bush quiz is woven into the night, keeping things fun and unpredictable. Joyful, theatrical, and unapologetically devoted, A Kate Bush Cornucopia delivers a night of music that’s loud, immersive, and unforgettable.

title: A History Comedy Show
summary: Award-winning comedian and history buff Raul Kohli presents a show where three comedians do stand up as their favourite character from history or on a time & place they’d most like to time travel to. So want to see stand-up comedy from Gandhi, Joan of Arc or Osama Bin Laden? Well now's your chance! A great way to laugh, learn and discover which comics you want to see at the Fringe. ***** (Guardian). 'Inspiringly Intelligent' (Paul…

A great way to laugh, learn and discover which comics you want to see at the Fringe. ***** (Guardian). 'Inspiringly Intelligent' (Paul Sinha, The Chase). 'The Bobby Thompson of our times' (Dan Jackson, author of the Northumbrians/regular on the Rest is History Podcast).

title: Acaprov The Improvised A Cappella Musical

Acaprov take a location and title from the audience before spontaneously creating a non-stop musical that will make you laugh, cry, dance in your seat, and sing all the way home! Everything seen and…

Every performance is unique. Acaprov take a location and title from the audience before spontaneously creating a non-stop musical that will make you laugh, cry, dance in your seat, and sing all the way home! Everything seen and heard is 100% invented in the moment and entirely from the minds, mouths and bodies of the performers - completely acappella. Joy - Heart - Harmony.

title: Adam Hopkins Sorry What Work In Progress

title: Adam Vincent Cigarettes Regret Baby

title: Alex Mitchell Tough
summary: Alex Mitchell is on a mission to find out what it really takes to be a tough guy in modern Britain. He's had a strange couple of years – being thrust into the limelight on mainstream telly, getting into a less than healthy relationship, being abused daily online, becoming disabled, and his best friend gave birth to a now three-foot bully. But, has Alex toughened up? The easy answer is no... but he's trying. Britain’s Got Talent…
